programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Chrisleys on Campus
programme.desc: When the Chrisleys take a road trip to Nashville to tour a college campus, Todd is excited for the additional family bonding time. Savannah tries to gain independence and go out with new friends, but Todd goes to the extreme and crashes her big night out.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Nurse Todd
programme.desc: Todd is hurt when he offers help to all his kids but no one needs it, until Savannah is hit with appendicitis.

programme.title: Modern Family: Caught in the Act
programme.desc: Plans backfire when the kids go to surprise their parents with breakfast in bed on their anniversary, only to catch Phil and Claire in a compromising position. Jay and Gloria's Vegas plans are thwarted, and Mitch and Cam obsess over a local restaurant.

programme.title: Modern Family: Bixby's Back
programme.desc: To avoid becoming a boring couple, Phil and Claire revisit a role-playing rendezvous from the previous Valentine's Day. Meanwhile, Jay plans an elaborate surprise for Gloria, and an admirer comes between Cameron and Mitchell on Valentine's Day.

programme.title: Modern Family: Princess Party
programme.desc: The guest list for Lily's princess-themed birthday party gets a little out of hand when Mitchell decides to invite his mom, much to Claire's dismay, and disinvite Fizbo, to Cameron's dismay.

programme.title: Modern Family: Regrets Only
programme.desc: When Phil and Claire have a huge fight and Phil has no idea what it was over, Gloria steps in to counsel Phil and Jay takes Claire. Meanwhile, Jay may come to regret buying Gloria a karaoke machine, and Cameron preps for a fundraiser.

programme.title: Modern Family: Two Monkeys and a Panda
programme.desc: While Claire runs herself ragged trying to play peacemaker with Haley and Alex, Phil sneaks off for a relaxing day at the spa. Gloria is horrified by Jay's plans to purchase two primo side-by-side crypts. Cameron decides to become an author.

programme.title: Modern Family: Boys' Night
programme.desc: Phil and Claire are worried when they learn that Luke has befriended their crotchety old neighbour, Mr. Kleezak. Jay's attempt to avoid sitting through a symphony concert with Gloria and Manny lands him in the middle of Mitchell and Cameron's night out.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Musical Man
programme.desc: Cameron is relishing his role as interim music director at Luke and Manny's school a little too much. Jay's brother is in town for a visit, and their relentless brotherly ribbing goes a little too far. Phil convinces the family to be in his realty ad.

programme.title: Modern Family: Someone to Watch Over Lily
programme.desc: Mitchell and Cameron look to assign legal guardians for Lily, in case anything happens to them, and secretly assess their family members. What they witness puts doubts in their minds.

programme.title: Modern Family: Mother's Day
programme.desc: Claire and Gloria want to spend a nice Mother's Day outdoors hiking with the kids, but their non-stop bickering drives Claire to the edge. Phil and Jay stay home to cook everyone a nice dinner, but things turn awkward.

programme.title: Modern Family: Good Cop Bad Dog
programme.desc: Phil and Claire swap parenting roles for the day. Claire will be the fun-loving good cop and Phil the disciplinarian bad cop. Gloria takes in every sob story and stray she comes across, and Jay gives business advice to an overzealous entrepreneur.

programme.title: Modern Family: See You Next Fall
programme.desc: The whole family is gathering at Jay's before heading out to Alex's graduation ceremony from middle school. Jay is preoccupied, hiding a Botox mishap from everyone, and Cameron is upset about Mitchell's habit of laughing at his expense.

programme.title: Modern Family: The One That Got Away
programme.desc: Jay wants nothing more than to have a quiet birthday out fishing on the lake, but the family thinks he really wants a big celebration. Claire and Mitchell wind up trapped in the yard of their childhood home. Phil runs into his old college nemesis.

programme.title: Overserved with Lisa Vanderpump: Diva Tea: Iggy Azalea and Trixie Mattel
programme.desc: Lisa throws a proper English Tea with some very improper conversation as Iggy Azalea and Trixie Mattel share tales of red carpet underwear fails, one-night stands, and a famous baby daddy!

programme.title: Overserved with Lisa Vanderpump: A Tuscan Feast: Joel McHale and Cheryl Hines
programme.desc: Lisa creates an al fresco Tuscan feast for two hilarious guests: Italian-born Joel McHale and actress Cheryl Hines. The day includes a mystery blindfold game, flaming cheese pasta, and Lisa confronting Joel about things he's said about her in the past.

programme.title: Overserved with Lisa Vanderpump: An Evening in Provence: Lance Bass and Vivica A. Fox
programme.desc: Lisa transports her best friend Lance Bass and actress Vivica A. Fox to the South of France with a Provence-themed party — and serial prankster Lance gets a taste of his own medicine.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Chicago Loyalty
programme.desc: Kim's fierce loyalty to her husband becomes a source of conflict while on a trip to Chicago. Kourtney struggles with anxiety in the aftermath of her breakup, so her sisters decide to plan a girls trip to Palm Springs to cure her breakup blues.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Kourtney's Choice
programme.desc: Kim plans a trip to New York for her husband's appearance on SNL to show Kourtney how far Scott has come as a family man. At the same time, Kim contemplates an unexpected move to Chicago, and Kris fears her mother might be seriously ill.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Eat Pray Fight
programme.desc: The family heads to Bali for a relaxing vacation, but tensions flare when Kourtney accuses Khloe of complaining too much. Scott tries to find buried treasure and enlists the help of his kids. In LA, Kendall and Kylie help their mom care for MJ.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Soul(mate) Searching
programme.desc: While on a spiritual quest to find balance in Bali, Kourtney gets some news that makes her consider a future with Scott. Kim and Khloe are determined to have an insightful psychic reading but get more than they bargained for.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Legally Brunette
programme.desc: Kim decides to follow in her father's footsteps and pursue her lifelong dream of becoming a lawyer, but worries she may have taken on more than she can handle.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Fire Escape
programme.desc: When devastating wildfires erupt in their neighborhood, the family is forced to flee from their homes, threatening to ruin the fairytale birthday party Rob is planning for his daughter. Kim awaits the president's word on her prison reform legislation.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Pet Peeve
programme.desc: Khloe’s mistrust of her mother’s boyfriend, Corey, resurfaces on a very awkward family trip to Palm Springs, leaving Kris hurt and confused about her daughter’s behavior. Meanwhile, the family stays with Kendall to escape the fires.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Unhappy Camper
programme.desc: Determined to fulfil one of North's lifelong dreams, Kim puts her survival skills to the test on an overnight camping trip in the wilderness. Malika heads back to Cleveland for the first time since True's birth and suspects Khloe is struggling internally.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Christmas Chaos
programme.desc: Kris reluctantly allows Kim to take over the annual Christmas Eve Party, but the holiday is in jeopardy when Kris learns Kim has invited an unwelcome guest. Khloe must come to the rescue when North’s beloved hamster unexpectedly dies and Kim can’t deal.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Heavy Meddle
programme.desc: Khole tries to mediate a fight between Kourtney and Kendall but only makes things worse. Meanwhile Kris makes herself at home in Kylie's new office space, so Kylie must show her mom who's boss.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Treachery
programme.desc: Khloe deals with some debilitating health issues, but her world is turned upside down when rumors surface of Tristan cheating with a close family friend, Jordyn Woods. Kim's husband brings his family and friends together.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Aftershock
programme.desc: After Tristan’s shocking betrayal, Kim and Kourtney take Khloe on a getaway to help her cope with the news. Khloe’s anger reaches a boiling point when she learns that Jordyn is speaking publicly about what happened.

programme.title: Movie: Madea's Witness Protection
programme.desc: A New York City banker puts his family into a witness protection program at his aunt's home when he is set up as the instigator of his company's fraudulent scheme.

programme.title: Movie: Boo 2! A Madea Halloween
programme.desc: When the kids go to a Halloween party at a haunted campground were a number of murders were once committed, Madea, Bam and Hattie set out to bring them home before anything bad can happen to them, but a chainsaw-wielding killer gets there before they do.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Signature Twists
programme.desc: Guy visits unique comfort food places, such as the dog-friendly neighbourhood joint that serves the Barking Lard BLT.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Streamlined Sammies
programme.desc: In Texas, a trailer serves scratch-made sammies to customers on the street and in the bar. In Minneapolis, a food truck offers lobster rolls. And in Dallas, burgers are served.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Coast to Coast Classics
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's driving the Camaro all over the nation for some real deal eats.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Authentic Eats
programme.desc: Guy finds real deal authentic eats in St. Louis and Syracuse.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Savory Standouts
programme.desc: Guy Fieri goes to Chicago to visit an authentic Cuban joint serving fricassee de pollo. He goes to Memphis to a neighbourhood gastro pub serving dishes like duck fried rice and homemade popcorn. In Annapolis, he savours chipolte habanero barbecue pork.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Kickin' It in Key West
programme.desc: Guy's checking out some of the awesome eats of Key West, Fla. From a funky little shack serving up New England seafood with coastal twists to a husband and wife team dishing up standout fish tacos.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Creative Creations
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri is divin' into inventive eats. In Burlington, Vt., a funky joint cooking up mac and cheese pancakes. In Richmond, Va., a down-home spot loadin' up their biscuits and going gangbusters with grits.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Breakfast, Brisket and Belly
programme.desc: Guy is in Los Angeles at a late-night spot with a twist, Columbus for a joint serving creative combos like brisket on corn flakes and Phoenix at a barbeque stop with smoked prime rib and pork belly dumplings.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: From Italy to Africa
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is heading to San Francisco for Ethiopian-style flank steak and sauteed prawns. In Minneapolis, an Italian joint is still scratch-making their pasta and prosciutto. Then, a Duluth diner is gathering ingredients straight from their planters.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: South Dakota Smorgasbord
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is hitting Triple-D's 50th state as he heads into Sioux Falls, SD, where a spot is taking chislic to the next level, and he finds the state's first Ethiopian joint. Plus, a Midwest-Southern mashup is putting their own stamp on comfort cooking.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Piling on the Pork
programme.desc: Guy is digging in and pigging out on this trip starting with a Puerto Rican spot in San Antonio that's building a unique take on nachos and cooking up a monster chop. In New Orleans, a gangster grill serves up pork knuckles and some sweet bird.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Cosmopolitan Comfort
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's grabbing all kinds of cosmopolitan comfort food. In Portsmouth, New Hampshire, a righteous joint puts a New England spin on corned beef and cabbage, plus a fresh take on stroganoff.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Chicken and Briskets
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's digging into everything from chicken to brisket. In Fargo, N.D., a funky place piling barbecue onto mac and throwin' heat into wings. A Mexican joint in Parkland, Fla., pumping out righteous recipes inside a gas station.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Worldwide Flavorfest
programme.desc: Guy starts this trip in Cincinnati at a Jamaican joint firing up their trademark jerk chicken and spicy snapper. Then, he stops ion Boston at a lunch place that is serving up authentic Italian.

programme.desc: Giada De Laurentiis and her daughter Jade host an Easter-themed family brunch. The menu includes Giada's takes on traditional holiday dishes, like Italian cinnamon rolls, and red wine eggs Benedict.

programme.title: Giada Entertains: Spring Supper
programme.desc: Giada De Laurentiis draws on the fresh flavours of spring as she celebrates Easter in Italian style with a fabulous family feast. The holiday menu includes Giada's spicy lamb Bolognese, creamy polenta with spinach, and asparagus with goat cheese.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home: Spring is in the Air
programme.desc: Ree Drummond celebrates springtime with seasonal recipes like shrimp with zucchini noodles and an easy lamb stew. She uses a shortcut for cheesy ham and egg hand pies that everyone loves, and her grain salad is fresh, vibrant and super simple.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Fire and Feast
programme.desc: Ree Drummond cooks a spring feast while Ladd and the cowboys are busy on the ranch. She makes perfect pork tenderloin with a delicious herby mustard cream, mac and cheese primavera, and the perfect side, roasted spring veggies and dip.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Switch Up Your Spring Feast
programme.desc: The Kitchen is rewriting the rule book for a spring feast with fun, new recipes that include jalapeno honey ham, easy rosemary deviled potatoes and chocolate matzoh bark for dessert. Plus, the hosts craft beautiful and simple metallic Easter eggs.

programme.title: Guy's Ranch Kitchen: Spring Picnic
programme.desc: Guy Fieri and his friends are planning a picnic. Domenica Catelli shakes up a Tennessee tart cocktail, and Gerry Garvin serves lobster cocktail. Aaron May builds a cobb salad in a jar, and Christian Petroni gets sweet on sugar snap peas with brown butter.

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out: Italian Made Easy
programme.desc: Michael Symon is back in his home kitchen to make carbonara-ish' pasta, tomato garlic bread and classic caesar salad.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Knighted Sir Loin
programme.desc: Sonoma County chef Tracey Shepos Cenami and Jersey-strong John Vitale fight for the right to battle greatness. If they want to beat Bobby Flay, however, they'll have to impress the sophisticated palates of Alex Guarnaschelli and Michael Voltaggio.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Sugar And Spice, But Not So Nice
programme.desc: Losing is never sweet. Pastry chefs Josh Johnson and Dana Cree both want the sweet rush of victory.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Thrown From the Throne
programme.desc: "Chopped" judge Amanda Freitag and walking culinary encyclopedia Simon Majumdar hope they are a winning combination, as Virginia-bred chef Ian Boden matches up with up-and-coming New York City chef Danielle Duran in hopes of slaying the Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: They Took The Cheese
programme.desc: It's a battle of Southern chefs as Houston's Roshni Gurnani faces off against New Orleans' Carl Schaubhut. Coaching them to victory against Bobby Flay are "Worst Cooks in America's" Anne Burrell and "Chopped's" Marcus Samuelsson.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Seeing Stars
programme.desc: Food Network Star alums Alex McCoy and Jay Ducote are in the house to outshine Bobby Flay. Food Network Star winner Damaris Phillips teams up with Chef Richard Blais to ensure that Bobby's star burns out.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: That's Amore
programme.desc: "Food Network Star" winner Christian Petroni teams up with chef Carla Hall and brings two dynamic chefs who have mastered the food of his motherland, Italy.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Express Lane Extreme
programme.desc: Guy Fieri puts the chefs to the test with games of extreme limitations. First, the chefs make their best chicken dish using only eight ingredients. Then, Guy asks for a regional comfort dish with a seven-ingredient limit.

programme.title: Tanked!: The Fast and the Fishiest
programme.desc: Lusso Auto Spa designs customizations for high end and rare vehicles, now they want an exotic fish tank that matches their automobiles. They've requested a massive 14 foot, three sided wonder that will sit amidst their multi-million dollar cars.

programme.title: Tanked!: Howie Mandel's Surprise Tank
programme.desc: Howie Mandel has reached out to ATM for another tank. Only this time it's a surprise for his manager's company. 3 Arts Entertainment already has an existing tank but it needs a serious upgrade.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Coral Super Bowl
programme.desc: The staff becomes concerned when Zola, the beloved African penguin falls mysteriously ill. Later, the aquarium witnesses the annual spawning of an endangered coral species, while Maggie the False Map turtle has a date with the dentist.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Bacon and Tomato's Big Adventure
programme.desc: The staff becomes concerned when Jupiter, the rescued sea lion is not himself. The Ocean Voyager exhibit awaits its new residents: black-blotched Fantail stingray siblings, Bacon and Tomato, and Shelley the shy box turtle makes friends.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Big Is Beautiful
programme.desc: After eating all his tank mate’s food, Tank the hungry sea turtle finds a space to eat in peace. Two beluga whales are welcomed to their new home at the aquarium, and Scarlett the lovable sea lion turns two.

programme.title: The Zoo: Miracle Cub
programme.desc: The ingenuity of zoo staff is put to the test as they devise a treatment for a newborn snow leopard cub struggling to walk and a group of surprisingly adorable Rodrigues fruit bats are trained for a big move.

programme.title: The Zoo: A Polar Bear in the City
programme.desc: The last polar bear in NYC is showing his age, so staff make sure he gets all the attention he needs. Also, a trio of red ruffed lemurs prepare for their debut and a new exhibit is constructed for the hellbender, a giant amphibian with a bad reputation.

programme.title: The Zoo: The Great Turtle Comeback
programme.desc: A charismatic ostrich named Olga works to be reunited with her flock. Buster the squirrel monkey is introduced to the zoo's troop of feisty females. A functionally extinct species of turtle finds new life, and everyone's favorite warthog is back.

programme.title: The Zoo: New Chick on the Block
programme.desc: A popular sea lion falls ill after ingesting a foreign object. The avian team devises a plan to increase the cock-of-the-rocks population. Endangered snakes are coupled for breeding, and Andean bear cubs meet their fans.

programme.title: The Zoo: Beloved Bugs
programme.desc: The zoo anxiously awaits the arrival of a snow leopard called K2's fourth cub. The staff is pleased when a pair of Andean condors embrace their new enclosure, while a squirmy binturong fights his annual vaccination.

programme.title: The Zoo: Fawns Become Friends
programme.desc: Two sickly newborn fawns form an unbreakable bond while they are hand-reared by staff. Leopard Khazo gets a surprise that enhances her life, and tensions run high as the reptile staff attempts to collect blood from Cuban crocs.

programme.title: The Zoo: A New Beginning
programme.desc: Max the camel faces new challenges as he ages. The zoo prepares to give an injured turkey vulture a permanent home, but after healing, there may be a change of plan. Willow the red panda gives birth to two baby cubs.

programme.title: The Zoo: Wallaby in the City
programme.desc: A rowdy, young markhor is injured and vets must treat his infected hoof. The TAB staff head to Manhattan to rescue a wallaby living in an apartment, while a fruit bat discovers how to spread her wings, and a trio of alligators move into their summer home.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Four-Million-Dollar Smile
programme.desc: Jesus bought a $20 scratcher that netted him a $4 million win. Now, this car-crazy millionaire needs a new pad to house all his flashy new rides in Kankakee, Illinois.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: The Sound of Freedom
programme.desc: Recent lottery winners go on over-the-top house hunts for their new dream homes.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Buy Now, Inherit Later
programme.desc: A construction worker that won $250,000 calls on David Bromstad to help him find a home close to his eight adult daughters. One daughter joins the house hunt and looks for a place that has projects to keep them busy and space for the grandkids to visit.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Mr. Double Lucky

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Rough Rambler Reno
programme.desc: A young family has outgrown their home, but major exterior issues and a dark interior are keeping it from being sold. Leslie and Lyndsay brighten and repair the outdated rambler, but pricing it right will be difficult with no comps in the neighborhood.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Rental Property Reno
programme.desc: A contractor is desperate to sell his rental property that's a real wreck. When he's tempted to overspend on the renovation, twins Leslie and Lyndsay help steer Jeff toward a more budget-friendly makeover with an eclectic style.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Road House to Show House
programme.desc: Leslie and Lyndsay help a family struggling to sell their roadside rambler. Hoping to distract buyers from the road noise outside, the twins make some bold design choices to turn the dated ranch house into a stylish home that a new family will love.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Better Than New

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Empty Nest Turned Family Retreat

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: No Appeal to Curb Appeal
programme.desc: A couple that's desperate to sell their bungalow after receiving no offers calls on real estate experts and twins Leslie and Lyndsay. The home needs some love to make it sellable, but the stakes are raised when the twins invest money to make improvements.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Split-level Struggle
programme.desc: Before a couple can buy their dream home, they must sell their outdated split level, and they're having trouble getting buyers in the door. Lyndsay and Leslie bring the home up to date with sleek, modern touches and minimalist elements.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Moving Sale Makeover
programme.desc: A couple is moving out of state for work and needs Leslie and Lyndsay's help to sell their home. The twins revamp their outdated ranch with a modern farmhouse style designed to reel in buyers who love to entertain.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Lake House Update
programme.desc: A woman who cares for her ailing father is struggling to sell her home in a desirable neighborhood. Leslie and Lyndsay jump at the opportunity to transform the outdated property into an industrial-chic showstopper that's perfect for a high-end buyer.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Keeping the Character
programme.desc: A young couple having trouble selling their older home ask Lyndsay and Leslie for help. The twins are challenged to keep the house's cozy character and add more charm to an aging property that's seen years of mish-mashed styles.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: Victorian Hodgepodge Gets Modern Makeover
programme.desc: After moving 20 times in 28 years, a couple is ready to make the move into a recently purchased Victorian their last. The rooms are a hash of renovations past, so Dave and Jenny Marrs help turn this house into a modern home where they'll want to stay.

programme.desc: Vincent wants nothing more than to pose for a picture with his favourite pop singer, Jagged Stones, but when the star rejects him, Vincent gets akumatized into Pixelator, who is determined to capture his idol's image for good.

programme.desc: After an argument with Ladybug, Chloe gets akumatized and turns into Antibug. For the first time ever, Ladybug must battle a villain with the same powers as her. Can she defeat her perfect opposite?

programme.title: Raven's Home: Fresh Off the Note
programme.desc: When Booker suspects that Nia's friend, Olivia, has a crush on him, he decides to put a 'Let's be friends' note in her locker, but accidentally puts it in Tess' locker.

programme.title: Sydney to the Max: He's All That
programme.desc: When Harry tells Sydney he is moving back to Portland permanently, she struggles with the idea of having a long distance relationship.

programme.title: Just Roll With It: A League of Their Own
programme.desc: The Bennett-Blatts take part in a charity sporting event to raise money for the local kids club.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Gridlocked/ Mama Bird
programme.desc: Bill brings the family out to the country for a road trip, but a traffic jam halts their plans. Tilly finds a bird's nest and tries to raise the chicks as her own, but they choose Cricket.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Welcome Home/ Raccooned
programme.desc: Cricket Green and his family move from the country to Big City to live with Gramma. Cricket and Bill accidentally disturb some raccoons in the garage, and they invade the house!

programme.title: Big City Greens: Fill Bill/ Critterball Crisis
programme.desc: When the Greens dine at a seafood restaurant, Cricket and Tilly decide to rescue a live octopus.

programme.title: Jessie: Pain in the Rear Window
programme.desc: Jessie is in charge of a carnival to help raise funds for the school. In an attempt to help bring in more money, Luke decides to show Jessie some dance moves, but ends up injuring his knee.

programme.title: Jessie: Teacher's Pest
programme.desc: When Zuri is having problems with a teacher at school, Jessie decides to volunteer in Zuri's classroom so she can assess the situation. Because Jessie has always been the teacher’s pet, she figures the teacher will love her but this isn't the case.

programme.title: Jessie: To Be Me or Not to Be Me
programme.desc: Jessie gets her first big acting part in a Shakespeare production in the park. When Jessie and Zuri switch personalities, that leaves an eight-year-old trying to pull off Jessie's performance and keep from ruining it for her.

programme.title: Jessie: Toy Con
programme.desc: Zuri must find a way to get back a cherished toy that Jessie passed on to her after she trades it to a toy collector. Meanwhile, Luke and Emma work together to teach Bertram Salsa dancing so he can compete in a dance contest to win his crush's heart.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: Stormy Weather
programme.desc: After losing a contest to become lead host on the Kidz Plus children's channel, Aurore is akumatized into Stormy Weather. With villainy in the forecast, it's up to Ladybug and Cat Noir to stop her and bring sunshine back to Paris.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: The Bubbler
programme.desc: Armed with his magical bubble-wand, Nino becomes The Bubbler, a villain who wants to rid the city of all parents who get in the way of kids having fun. Ladybug and Cat Noir try to avoid his bubbles and save the day.

programme.title: Public Affairs Events
programme.desc: Public affairs events, congressional hearings, speeches, and interviews.

programme.title: Politics & Public Policy Today
programme.desc: The day's major public affairs and political events presented without interruption.

programme.title: Washington Journal
programme.desc: A political call-in program that touches on political and legislative issues.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer: A Twisted Connection
programme.desc: When a suburban mom is murdered in her own home, investigators chase down an elusive killer that no one saw coming.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer: Killer in Plain Sight
programme.desc: When a trusting, young college student is viciously murdered and her apartment set ablaze, police untangle a web of relationships to find a killer who's dangerously close to home.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer: New Mexico Massacre
programme.desc: A beloved couple and their special needs son are savagely murdered in rural New Mexico, leading detectives to uncover long buried secrets in a tight-knit town.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer: The Mayor’s Wife
programme.desc: After a respected educator and mother of two is found dead in small-town Alabama, the investigation focuses on fraught family relationships, but the discovery of a dark secret unveils a killer no one saw coming.

programme.title: Killer Motive: The McStay Family Mystery
programme.desc: When a beautiful family of four including two young children vanishes in California, police think they left voluntarily. It takes a decade for the awful truth to emerge: a killer, hiding in plain sight, slaughtered an entire family.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: In the Dead of Night
programme.desc: It was Easter Sunday. The Stock family celebrated at home. Hours later, gunshots turned their farmhouse into a house of horrors. There was an arrest but one tiny clue didn't fit. This case was far from being solved.

programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples: Lee Ann Riedel & Ralph Salierno
programme.desc: A woman and her lover get entangled in a tragic and deadly case of mistaken identity.

programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples: Amber Dufoe & Richard Oakes
programme.desc: A couple inflicts their own brand of vigilante justice on an enemy from the past.

programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples: Linda Bury & Joshua Mebane
programme.desc: A plan by teenaged lovers to run away and be together goes horribly wrong.

programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples: Airika Lijegren & Ryan Martinez
programme.desc: A couple's secret love affair ends in a gruesome double murder.

programme.title: Dateline: Unraveled
programme.desc: Connie Jones gives her first national interview since ex-husband Dwight Jones killed six people in Arizona over five days. Domestic violence and mass murder are discussed by experts and the criminal justice system that didn't stop Dwight is examined.

programme.title: Dateline: The Figure in the Garage
programme.desc: Police are desperate for answers when a beloved firefighter is found dead in his garage. A neighbour's home security camera captures a figure near the crime scene but is it the killer?

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Mystery On Blood Mountain
programme.desc: It started with a frightening horror flick from the '80s. Then decades later, it was happening for real. Four people were dead and investigators believed they were chasing a serial killer.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Bathtub Mystery
programme.desc: She was a beaming bride. It was a haunting death. Sarah and Ryan were newlyweds when she drowned in the bathtub. Did she die of natural causes or was it deliberate? It took three trials to find the truth.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: A Shot in the Dark
programme.desc: A young woman is found with a fatal head wound and her hand on the shotgun. Her fiancé claims she killed herself but grieving family members insist the suicide scene was staged. The case goes cold until a new prosecutor takes a second look.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: Red Sash Death
programme.desc: A beloved grandmother is found with a red bathrobe sash knotted around her neck. Her death looks like suicide until the Medical Examiner rules homicide. The victim's 76-year-old husband is charged with murder but the case takes a surprising turn.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: Deadly Crash
programme.desc: A car crash on a rural highway leaves one woman dead while her husband walks away unscathed. It appears to be a tragic accident. Still, one state trooper can't shake the feeling the crash is anything but routine.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: In the Fire
programme.desc: Firefighters discover the charred remains of a young wife and mother but the flames didn't kill her. She sustained a gunshot wound to the head and the evidence points to suicide. Loved ones argue it's a case of murder.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: The Cop's Wife
programme.desc: A police officer discovers his young wife with a fatal gunshot wound from his service weapon. Her death is ruled a suicide. Investigators uncover a shocking story that leads to a sensational trial with an even more sensational verdict.

programme.title: Movie: Star Trek Into Darkness
programme.desc: Captain Kirk organizes a manhunt to find one man who is bent on mass destruction.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Selma's Choice
programme.desc: Aunt Selma realizes that she might wind up dying alone and thinks that having a baby can relieve her loneliness. She decides to test this theory by taking Bart and Lisa to the park, with disastrous results.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Brother From the Same Planet
programme.desc: Miffed, Bart goes to a Big Brother agency claiming he's an abandoned child and looking for a new 'father' after Homer leaves him waiting in the pouring rain after soccer practice.

programme.title: The Simpsons: I Love Lisa
programme.desc: Lisa gives Ralph Wiggum a Valentine's Day card, and Ralph assumes that she's in love with him. Lisa tries to let him down nicely, but Ralph won't get the hint until she yells at him in front of a live studio audience at the Krusty the Clown special.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Duffless
programme.desc: Lisa conducts a secret experiment for the Springfield Elementary School science fair to see who's smarter, Bart or a hamster. Meanwhile, Homer is forced to swear off beer after being arrested on a D.U.I.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Last Exit to Springfield
programme.desc: Clueless Homer finds himself filling in for the Springfield Nuclear Power Plant's union leader when it comes time to negotiate their new contract with Mr. Burns.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Front
programme.desc: Using 'Abraham Simpson' as their pseudonym, Bart and Lisa are hired as writers for The Itchy & Scratchy Show and eventually win an Emmy award for their work.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Whacking Day
programme.desc: Everyone in Springfield is excited for Whacking Day, a decade-long tradition which calls for the townspeople to beat snakes to death with sticks. But leave it to Lisa to spoil the town's fun when she condemns the holiday as violent.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Marge in Chains
programme.desc: Marge gets busted for shoplifting at the Kiwk-E-Mart and is sentenced to 30 days in prison. Bart concocts a brilliant scheme to break her out of jail that involves a party dress, a wig and a crowbar.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homer's Barbershop Quartet
programme.desc: After the kids find an album cover with Homer's picture on it, Homer reveals that he used to perform in a barbershop quartet with Principal Skinner, Chief Wiggum and Apu.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Cape Feare
programme.desc: Bart suspects everybody when he receives a threatening letter written in blood. He finds out that the letters are from Sideshow Bob, who's been writing the threats in prison and will soon be released on parole.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Rosebud
programme.desc: When Mr. Burns wants to get his favourite stuffed bear, Bobo, back from Maggie Simpson, he offers Homer one million dollars and three Hawaiian islands in exchange for the toy. Meanwhile, Smithers organizes a birthday party for Mr. Burns.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Bart's Inner Child
programme.desc: While at a self-help seminar, Bart is singled out by the lecturer and the townspeople are told they should strive to be more like him. Chaos soon reigns.

programme.title: Family Guy: Foxx in the Men House
programme.desc: Peter becomes friends with a cool, handsome paramedic named Stryker Foxx. Wrapped up in his newfound 'coolness,' he soon dumps Quagmire, Joe and Cleveland.

programme.title: Family Guy: The Movement
programme.desc: When Peter starts coaching for Quahog's minor league baseball team, he gets constipated during the national anthem and must kneel, unintentionally becoming the face of racial justice.

programme.title: Archer: Blood Test
programme.desc: Archer is in for a huge surprise when his favourite call girl, Trinette, shows up at ISIS with a bouncing baby boy on her hip and a subpoena for a paternity test in her purse.

programme.title: Archer: Pipeline Fever
programme.desc: While Malory tries to make ISIS a green workplace, Archer and Lana head to the Louisiana bayous to prevent a dangerous eco-terrorist from bombing America's largest natural gas pipeline.

programme.title: Movie: Young Guns II

programme.title: Chimp Sanctuary
programme.desc: Sue Perkins travels to Chimp Haven, the US national chimpanzee sanctuary in Louisiana, to visit six female ex-laboratory chimpanzees starting retirement.

programme.title: The Hunt: Nowhere to Hide: Plains
programme.desc: The open arenas of grassland and desert make up half of all land on our planet. In these exposed habitats, predators like cheetahs, bald eagles and lions can usually see their prey. But it works both ways: their prey can see them too.

programme.title: The Hunt: Race Against Time: Coasts
programme.desc: The coast is the only place on the planet where predators from air, land and sea come together; powered by the tides and thrashed by waves, this is a world of continuous change. Opportunities never last long, so hunters are always in a race against time.

programme.title: The Hunt: The Hardest Challenge
programme.desc: The contests between predators and prey are the most dramatic events in nature. The premiere episode reveals the extraordinary range of techniques predators use to catch their prey.

programme.title: The Hunt: In the Grip of Seasons: Arctic
programme.desc: This episode looks at the challenges of hunting in the Arctic, the most seasonal place on Earth. To a predator, seasonal change is a problem; it means that all the parameters of the hunt change too.

programme.title: The Hunt: Hide and Seek: Jungles
programme.desc: Follow tigers, harpy eagles, chimpanzees, army ants and other predators as they rise to the challenge of hunting within the forest. The prize for succeeding at nature's great game of hide-and-seek is one worth winning.

programme.title: The Hunt: Hunger at Sea: Oceans
programme.desc: This episode follows blue whales, sharks, sea lions and dolphins to reveal the strategies they use to hunt for prey. The ocean is an immense wilderness; predators face an endless search to find and catch food, yet the ocean is home to remarkable hunters.

programme.title: South Pacific: Ocean of Islands

programme.title: South Pacific: Ocean of Volcanoes

programme.title: Ancient Unexplained Files: Grave of the Red Skulls

programme.title: Ancient Unexplained Files: Gladiator Graveyard

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Secret of Supervillain Island
programme.desc: On a strange island off the coast of Croatia, the mysterious ruins of a long-abandoned hideout look like they once belonged to a James Bond supervillain, and new discoveries reveal why it was built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Fortress of the Spy
programme.desc: A battle-scarred ruin in the Middle East is evidence of espionage that resulted in tremendous violence on a vast scale; experts expose the truth behind the strange building that holds the secrets of one of the world's most infamous deceptions.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Greatest Icons
programme.desc: Places that were once home to Hollywood films and world-famous musicians are now run-down, abandoned, and forbidden; experts investigate their mysteries and reveal the astonishing secrets behind ten of the world's most iconic abandoned places.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Fortress of the Spy
programme.desc: A battle-scarred ruin in the Middle East is evidence of espionage that resulted in tremendous violence on a vast scale; experts expose the truth behind the strange building that holds the secrets of one of the world's most infamous deceptions.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Strangest Alien Worlds
programme.desc: Discoveries of new planets have revealed countless worlds much stranger than Earth. Some of these strange worlds don't have stars, others are made out of diamonds.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Asteroids: Worlds That Never Were
programme.desc: From icy worlds with more fresh water than Earth to flying mountains of pure metal, asteroids shaped our past and promise much for the future.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Journey to a Black Hole
programme.desc: Journey to the heart of the M87 supermassive black hole, the first and only black hole ever photographed, and explore the mystery of how it grew so large, what lies inside and how it controls the entire galaxy.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Mission to a Comet
programme.desc: The Rosetta mission was a ground-breaking expedition to land on a comet. Learn what the journey discovered and how these objects helped create life on Earth.

programme.title: Phantom Signals: The Ghost on the Radio
programme.desc: When someone picks up a radio distress call from a seven-year-old boy lost alone in the desert, authorities embark on a search-and-rescue mission to find him; as the hunt continues, the case becomes more and more mysterious.

programme.title: Phantom Signals: Soviet Doomsday Warning
programme.desc: A Russian radio station has broadcast a signal nonstop since the Cold War, and no one knows why; experts use hi-tech methods to investigate what it is, and what might happen if it ever stops.

programme.title: Phantom Signals: Alien Evidence: The Holy Grail
programme.desc: When a powerful radio beam originating from deep space is detected by experts on earth, some suspect its hard evidence of extraterrestrial life; new investigations into this shocking signal might reveal the truth.

programme.title: Phantom Signals: To Catch a UFO
programme.desc: An intercept pilot chases a UFO only to vanish forever, then, a mysterious hum plagues 2% of the planet.

programme.title: Phantom Signals: Curse of the Lost Cosmonaut
programme.desc: When two experts build their own radio-listening station to intercept the secret communications of American and Soviet astronauts, they capture traces of a haunting voice that may be a lost Russian cosmonaut. New, declassified evidence reveals the truth.

programme.title: Phantom Signals: Omen of the Pharaoh's Wail
programme.desc: At the tomb of one 3,000-year-old Egyptian pharaoh, experts report that the massive statues that guard the site can sing; using cutting-edge technology, investigators hunt for an explanation for this mysterious phenomenon.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: War of the Galaxies
programme.desc: Galaxies are locked in continual combat across the universe, and our own Milky Way will face its biggest opponent ever, the Andromeda Galaxy, in a titanic and deadly struggle that could create a new and unrecognizable super galaxy.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Yeti: The New Evidence
programme.desc: New investigation of declassified Soviet files reveals evidence of an explanation for the grisly deaths of nine students who went missing in Siberia. Scientists examine clues that may prove the existence of a yeti.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Death From the Sky and Mexican Chupacabra
programme.desc: In Britain, a missing man's body is found with electrocution burns and a green ointment on him, his case is mysteriously closed down. Plus, hundreds of vampire-like attacks in Mexico leave livestock drained of blood.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Fatal Love
programme.desc: When familiarity breeds contempt, love can turn to hate.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Fruit of the Family Tree
programme.desc: A woman searching for acceptance from her family unexpectedly finds passionate love with her uncle. When their families turn on them in the face of taboo, they flee to start a new life in paradise.

programme.title: Primal Instinct: Strings Attached
programme.desc: Sparks fly when Chuck Rock meets Beth Williams in Tampa, Florida. When the relationship turns sour, Chuck finds himself drawn into a puzzling web of intrigue and danger and becomes the target of a mysterious stranger.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: I Will Find You
programme.desc: 19-year-old Ali Kemp was at a pool in Leawood, Kansas in June 2002 when her father found her body in the pool's pump room. News reports and interviews with investigators and family tell the story of a father's quest to find his daughter's killer.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: In The Neighborhood
programme.desc: In May 2017, high school teacher Theresa Lockhart is a no-show at her confirmation sponsor's big event and she falls completely out of contact. When her car is discovered with nothing inside, police begin turning this placid community upside down.

programme.title: 48 Hours: What Ever Happened to Mary Day?
programme.desc: A 13-year-old girl vanishes in 1981. Detectives believe she was murdered. Years later a woman appears and claims to be the missing girl.

programme.title: Crimes Gone Viral: Drunk Driving Terror
programme.desc: Two officers respond to a drunk driver speeding the wrong way down a highway and find themselves in a wildly dangerous situation. And then, a family follows a car swerving dangerously, and is forced to intervene to prevent tragedy.

programme.title: Crimes Gone Viral: Don't Mess With Me
programme.desc: A mother is inside a gas station when a man steals her car, with her 13-year-old and 6-month old daughters inside. Then, when a waitress is sexually assaulted, she takes matters into her own hands, attacking her assaulter.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: This Just In
programme.desc: After college co-ed Jessica O'Grady vanishes late one night after leaving to see her boyfriend, locals are left to wonder if she was kidnapped.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Serial Confessions
programme.desc: Watch and hear the shocking confession of a real estate agent turned serial killer and a stunning rescue video of a woman held hostage in a shipping container.

programme.title: Crimes Gone Viral: Grab and Go
programme.desc: A robber attempts to hold up four young men at gunpoint, but he's in for a surprise when his victims fight back. And then, a man with a shotgun storms into a garage, but is outmatched by an employee who won't back down.

programme.title: Crimes Gone Viral: Stranger Danger
programme.desc: A man steals a car with two young siblings inside, causing a panic. As they try to escape, the kidnapper grabs the girl's hoodie, but her brother bravely fights back. And then, a 12-year-old stands up to the woman trying to kidnap her baby brother.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: Route 29
programme.desc: In August 2013, a 17-year-old rising social media star and high school athlete disappeared along the infamous Route 29. A massive search by local and federal authorities yielded zero results until a security video revealed a chilling clue.

programme.title: Living a Nightmare: Trouble in Giles County
programme.desc: Business owner Larry Hughes goes missing from his Pulaski, Tennessee, home. His distraught wife Mary Ann enlists police to investigate, but little do they know it will take a quarter-century to put the pieces of this sinister puzzle together.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Into the Wild
programme.desc: While out for a run in the Montana wilderness, 22-year-old college student Kari Swensen is taken prisoner by two mountain men. When she learns of their twisted plans for her, she'll do everything she can to escape or die trying.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Case Against Brooke Skylar Richardson
programme.desc: The parents of Brooke Skylar Richardson speak out. The real story behind the international headlines in the case of an alleged unthinkable crime.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Who Wanted Howard Pilmar Dead?
programme.desc: '48 Hours' explores the riveting real-life murder mystery around the death of a New York City businessman and the 23-year search for answers.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Bound by Honor
programme.desc: Love and tradition collide when a young woman forbidden from dating falls for a handsome stranger. She knows she must keep her relationship hidden from her orthodox father and protective brother.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Lone Star Lust
programme.desc: A woman enters into an affair with her daughter's grandfather, causing a major rift in the family and eventually leading to a bloody Texas showdown.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: Targeted in the Night
programme.desc: A 10-year-old girl walks home from her friend's house at dusk and then mysteriously vanishes. As it becomes clear she's been abducted, suspicion falls on a series of men. Then, a night of celebration ends in murder for a young entrepreneur.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Jenner Beach Murders
programme.desc: A Christian couple's weekend getaway takes a tragic turn when they are found murdered on a northern California beach. Satanic imagery found nearby leads local Sheriff's deputies on a manhunt complicated by a cagey killer who covered his tracks.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Target on Her Back
programme.desc: 24-year-old grocery store worker, Caroline Nosal befriends her introvert colleague Christopher O'Kroley. Chris is eager to make friends with Caroline possibly too eager. Caroline complains to store management about Chris things don't turn out as planned.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Never Predicted
programme.desc: When Andrea Farrington meets fellow employee Alex Kozak she thinks that romance could be on the horizon. She has no idea that feelings of romance will be replaced by suspicion and fear, leading to a final rejection that has fatal consequences.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Screaming Terror
programme.desc: Alice Hufnagle was raped and murdered on November 22. 2002. After following numerous leads and dead-ends, Police find the vital clues that lead them to Jeffery Vample, Alice's co-worker from a local Pharmacy.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Deadly Delivery
programme.desc: Sandy Berfield was killed Jan 20, 2000. She suffered years of harassment from a co-worker and finally had him jailed for violating a restraining order. Released, he sent her a bomb. Steve Caruso was sentenced to life in prison with no parole.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Twisted Plan
programme.desc: When trusted legal assistant Gail Spencer fails to show up for work, her coworkers are rightfully concerned. But as the sordid details of her abduction come to light, suddenly it seems like someone at the office may know more than they are letting on.

programme.title: Meyer Lansky and the Crime Syndicate
programme.desc: The story of Meyer Lansky, an associate of Lucky Luciano who was linked to criminal financial operations, but the FBI struggled to pin anything on him, or find his riches.

programme.title: The Mob Enforcer: Tony Spilotro
programme.desc: See the story of Tony Spilotro, who protected the Chicago Mafia's interests in the casinos of Las Vegas and became a target for the FBI.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT to Taunt the Cops
programme.desc: Jimmy Maxwell is no stranger to prison life. But every time he gets arrested, he outsmarts officials and escapes. His go-for-broke nature makes him a menace for authorities, who come face to face with his volatile nature each time they corner him.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got a Rich Widow
programme.desc: Brian Maurice Fuller charms his way into wealthy people's homes, only to rob them blind. He gets caught, does his time and is released. But Fuller can't resist the lure of robbing the rich. He eludes police until a tip leads them right to his door.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got a Gun Made of Toilet Paper
programme.desc: Kerry Silvers was facing 55 years in the slammer for robbery and battery, so he decided to escape. Along with two other prisoners they overpowered a few guards and were able to calmly walk out of prison.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Fall in Love With a Prison Guard
programme.desc: Terry Banks is in prison for life. When he falls for a guard named Lynette, he's determined to break free to start a life with her. She helps him escape and they go on the run. But when the FBI tracks them down, will they commit another desperate act?

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT to Crawl My Way to Freedom
programme.desc: After a botched robbery, Darryl Norris faces murder charges and a long prison sentence. He pulls off a brilliant escape through the ceiling of his cell and plans to flee the country. But authorities are determined to find him and lock him up for good.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got a Gun Made of Toilet Paper

programme.desc: Trace the family trees of the greatest fighting vehicles and armoured personnel carriers in history.

programme.desc: Adolf Hitler is determined to fight to the very end, even if it costs millions of Germans their lives. He puts his faith in his the 'Wunderwaffe' and the 'wonder weapons,' including the first ever ballistic missile, the V2.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Road to Baghdad
programme.desc: See the shot by shot firefights in the 21 day bloody battle for Baghdad from the warrior's point of view.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: The Industry of War
programme.desc: Hitler is determined to rebuild Germany's military strength after the destruction of almost all its weaponry in the First World War. To overcome his country's dire shortage of raw materials, he plans to steal them from other countries.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Designed for Power
programme.desc: Hitler's mastery of propaganda, and instinct for effective design, used to create everything from the swastika flag to the striking uniforms of the storm troopers, help win huge support for the Nazi party, a vital step in its march towards total power.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Pearl Harbor
programme.desc: Experience the event that changed the war's course, hear the stories of those who were there and feel the momentum behind the attack that provoked the world's greatest superpower to join the Allied forces.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Marines at Hue
programme.desc: The city of Hue, South Vietnam, was the site of one of the fiercest battles of the Vietnam War. Three under-strength U.S. Marine battalions, consisting of fewer than 2,500 men, attacked and soundly defeated overwhelming, entrenched enemy troops.

programme.title: Weaponology: Fighter
programme.desc: Exploring the development of engine power, wings, maneuverability and ejection systems, find out how fighter jets now rule the land and sky.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Tet Offensive
programme.desc: During the infamous Tet Offensive of 1968, an elite band of US Special Operations troops are called in to rescue dozens of helpless civilians trapped in the border town of Chau Doc, which has been captured by an overwhelming Viet Cong invasion force.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Search and Destroy
programme.desc: In a battle known as the Nine Days in May, the troops of the US 4th Infantry Division are on a search and destroy mission in Vietnam's Central Highlands when they run headlong into a massive force of North Vietnamese soldiers on the Cambodian border.

programme.title: Deep Sea UFO Encounters

programme.title: Elinor Wonders Why: The Science of Staying Warm/ The Seed of an Idea

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Escape From Dannemora: Killers on the Loose (Part 1)
programme.desc: Two dangerous killers break out of one of New York’s toughest prisons. Convicted murderers Richard Matt and David Sweat cut through steel walls, crawl through steampipes and get their way through a maze of tunnels on their way to freedom.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Escape From Dannemora: Getaway Car (Part 2)
programme.desc: The manhunt for escaped prisoners Richard Matt and David Sweat was growing, expanding from the United States to Canada. Thousands of leads were being followed, but weeks into the search, there was still no sign of the missing men.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Finding Susan Powell: The Secret They Couldn’t Talk About Part 1
programme.desc: Susan Powell, a 28-year-old mother of two, goes missing in December of 2009. The mystery deepens as more details about her marriage to husband Josh and their life behind closed doors emerge.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Finding Susan Powell: What the Children Saw Part 2
programme.desc: Authorities search for missing mother of two, Susan Powell, in every nook and cranny of the desert in Western Utah while her friends and family wait for a break in the case.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Bernie Madoff: Most Hated Man (Part 1)
programme.desc: Bernie Madoff was a legend on Wall Street. But he would eventually confess to his sons that he had been living a lie; that this secret fund was nothing more than a multi-billion dollar fraud, the biggest Ponzi scene ever.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Bernie Madoff: Who Else Knew? (Part 2)
programme.desc: The news of Bernie Madoff’s arrest sent shockwaves around the world. Investigators were about to unravel a scheme that went back decades and involved several loyal employees.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Point of Origin
programme.desc: In 1984, California was riddled with 10 arson fires in three weeks. When some evidence points to other fires further up north, the investigation widens and continues until a fingerprint is finally found.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Seeds for Doubt
programme.desc: A well-respected nurse in a small community dies in a car accident. Investigators suspect drunk driving, until test results come back showing no alcohol was ingested.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Trial by Fire
programme.desc: A house erupts into flames on a winter night, killing one person and injuring another. The survivor blamed a kerosene heater for the fire, but the evidence did not match her story.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Marked for Life
programme.desc: In 1957 the police search for a man who committed several crimes in one night, including murder. Eventually, the case turned cold. Almost fifty years later, with the help of scientific advances, the investigators find their man.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Within Arm's Reach
programme.desc: A man accused of killing his estranged wife insists she committed suicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Private Thoughts
programme.desc: An entire family found dead inside their burned-out home appears to be a murder-suicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Soiled Plan
programme.desc: Police instituted an intense search after a mother of two young children went missing. Days later they found her body. Then the case went cold for twenty years, until advances in technology allowed the investigators to see the case in a new light.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Headquarters
programme.desc: Hunters stumble upon a scene that includes a skull and small bones, bits of clothing, a woman's shoe, and a strand of hair. Police determine a woman was stabbed to death, and reconstruct an image of her face to find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Breaking News
programme.desc: When a young reporter is murdered in her apartment, and the two suspects are cleared of any wrongdoing, police must turn to a databank of well over 8000 felons to catch the killer, leading to the first conviction in the U.S, based on this evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All the World's a Stage
programme.desc: Police must investigate one of their own when a detective says his wife shot herself in the head. While he claims he called 911 as soon as he could, evidence makes police doubt the detective's story.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shear Luck
programme.desc: Investigators have to reassemble a computer disk that has been cut to pieces with shears, in order to determine the guilt or innocence of an Air Force serviceman suspected of brutally murdering his wife.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tagging a Suspect
programme.desc: Bomb attacks typically pose a difficult problem for investigators to solve due to the absence of the attacker and a damaged crime scene, but forensic scientists manage to uncover miniscule pieces of plastic that lead straight to the killer.

programme.desc: Rene is shocked by what he finds; Darrell's locker multiplies his investment; Ivy tests his radar on the best.

programme.title: Storage Wars: The Clamper Caper
programme.desc: Brandi and Jarrod uncover an Illuminati-ng stash, Dave does what he does best, and Mary finally gets the help she needs.

programme.title: Wipeout: The Big Balls Are Back, Baby!
programme.desc: Fire performers, a Rock 'n' Roll father-daughter duo, and bubbleologists have a chance to traverse three of the most challenging courses in Wipeout.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Autograph Corrector
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes to find out questions and trivia like why Q wore a wedding ring during a challenge, which crew member slapped him way too hard, and who has a history with the punishment guest.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Bogey Man
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes and discover who considered taking a quick thumbs down. Plus, find out what type of vacation Murr prefers, and how many attempts it took to film the punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Hell on Wheels
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes and discover what kind of vehicle the Jokers had to stay in for a challenge. Plus, find out how Murr’s TV career actually started. Finally, find out why tonight's punishment was nostalgic for the guys.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Joker for a Day
programme.desc: Find out which challenges the crew loves the most and what the original name for the TV show started off as. Also, find out how the Jokers pick their victims.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Pay It Forward
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes on the very first Impractical Jokers episode and discover what social superpower the Jokers now possess. Plus, find out which audio equipment is not used anymore and the true history around Joe's 'nosing'.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Butterfly Crime Scene
programme.desc: Find out what classic phrase was uttered in this early episode that is still said today, and what unaired challenges almost made it to the show. Plus, the real backstory of Butterfly Crime Scene.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Unmotivational Speaker
programme.desc: Find out which classic Joker’s lines are still being uttered and which of the Alma Mater’s gets mentioned. Plus, what inspired tonight’s punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Drawing a Blank
programme.desc: Find out what classic bit began in this early episode, which Jokers used to live together, and why filming in Times Square became a bad idea.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hump Day
programme.desc: The guys geek out while lending a hand to customers at a casual restaurant, then battle across the table of a focus group. Plus, tonight's big loser gets spitting mad when forced to spend some quality time at the zoo.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Out of Left Field
programme.desc: The guys try not to crack up during a four-way face off and later find that a stroll with the Gatto pups is no walk in the park. Plus, tonight's big loser suffers more than muscle failure in a major league embarrassment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Sucks for You
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Joe and Murr bus their way through Katz’s Deli, then express some unpopular opinions at the park. Plus, tonight’s big loser must talk his way through some real highs and lows, in a punishment that truly sucks.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Twists and Turns
programme.desc: Four friends compete to embarrass each other in the ultimate hidden camera showdown.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Crash Test Dummies
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q take some customers for a wild ride, and things get messy when they ask fellow shoppers for a hand. Plus, the big losers suffer a monster punishment that leaves them crushed.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Card Against Humanity
programme.desc: Q, Murr, Joe and Sal have customers seeing red while working at an optician's office, then get too close for comfort eavesdropping on strangers' conversations. Plus, the big loser gives the business at a networking event.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Running of the Bullies
programme.desc: Q, Murr, Joe and Sal offer up peculiar specials at a steakhouse and get creepy while helping to clean a prop house. Plus, tonight's big loser realizes he may need his own lifeguard after making waves at the pool.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Twists and Turns
programme.desc: Four friends compete to embarrass each other in the ultimate hidden camera showdown.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Snow Way Out
programme.desc: Find out which Joker only drinks coffee after 2pm; who is most self-conscious about singing; and how long did Joe and Q wait inside while Murr and Sal hung out on a ski lift in the freezing cold.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Fe-mail
programme.desc: The Joker that absolutely hates massages; and the length of time it took the make-up team to get Joe all doled up for his debut as a female techie.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Everything's Just Rosie
programme.desc: How many pounds of potatoes were made for the famous Scoopski Potatoes challenge.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: All the Wrong Moves
programme.desc: What prop does Murr carry almost daily? Which Jokers danced in their high school musical?

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins College
programme.desc: Adam shares why becoming a dropout billionaire is unlikely and how school rankings have little to do with education quality. Plus, student loans.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Emily Ruins Adam
programme.desc: Emily takes over to ruin Adam, debunking IQ tests and pointing out information Adam has gotten wrong in the past. Plus, she explains the backfire effect.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Dating
programme.desc: Adam swipes right on knowledge by exposing the flaws in dating sites. Plus, alpha males, and wolves, don't exist, and personality tests are a failure.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Having a Baby
programme.desc: Adam dispels the myth about getting pregnant after 35, delves into breastfeeding vs. formula, and explores postpartum depression for women, and men.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Double Takes: Back to Fight or Flight
programme.desc: Michael jumps back in time and unleashes unseen content for a fresh spin on classic Carbonaro bits. Michael reanimates a chameleon fish, reboots lengthy corks, remakes the airport bird man, and more with all-new reactions.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Double Takes: Back to the Ice
programme.desc: Michael rehashes a potato laser, re-designs an emergen-suit, and takes another shot on the ice and more.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Double Takes: Back to the Meet and Greet
programme.desc: Michael Carbonaro performs magic tricks on unsuspecting victims, all caught on camera.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Double Takes: Back to Aztec Portal
programme.desc: Michael Carbonaro performs magic tricks on unsuspecting victims, all caught on camera.

programme.desc: A mentally-stunted stunt man, a drunk doing some self-dentistry, and a yahoo trimming his shrubbery with an automatic weapon.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Hillbillies 5
programme.desc: Counting down the 20 most blockheaded bumpkins ever caught on tape.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Swim Shady
programme.desc: The guys hit some bad reception working at a desk. Plus, tonight's big loser takes photos of a water aerobics class, but ends up drowning in shame.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Parent Trap
programme.desc: The guys get stuck in a grocery post-it showdown, and tonight's big loser earns a time-out for his outrageous behavior at a kids' play space.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: X Man
programme.desc: The guys compete in their first four-way challenge. Later, see what happens when they try to lead a kid's art class, and which loser fails so badly that he's hit with an on-the-spot punishment that leaves him seeing red.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Medium, Well Done
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Q, and Joe pose as TV execs pitching insane shows, and tonight's big loser undergoes a psychic reading that puts his real life on the wrong track.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Butt of the Joker
programme.desc: The guys pair up in focus group presentations, and tonight's loser tries to cure the public of a nasty habit, but gets people smoking mad.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Three Men and Your Baby
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr, and Q get snap happy posing as photographers, and all but one of the guys are faced with a punishment that's not child's play.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Rubbed the Wrong Way
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr cruise the food court sending texts to strangers, then throw caution, and groceries, to the wind. And tonight's loser is cast as a genie in a play but wishes he could be anywhere else.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Party Crasher
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr dodge shakedowns with the help of some strangers, and tonight's loser has a run-in at a party that leaves him down for the count.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dover and Out
programme.desc: The guys survey employees with odd questions, and tonight's loser unveils a mural in a small town whose residents react with big city rage.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Speech Impediment
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr crack each other up from behind glass, then test out awkward proposals. Plus, the big loser gets tongue-tied while speaking to government officials, and later, Joey Fatone goes behind the scenes on after party.

programme.title: Movie: Madea Goes to Jail
programme.desc: Grandma Madea is mischievous and impulsive with a few anger control issues. After a high-speed chase and appearing in front of a judge, she finds herself in jail with a variety of interesting characters.

programme.title: Movie: Boo 2! A Madea Halloween

programme.title: Movie: Madea Goes to Jail
programme.desc: Grandma Madea is mischievous and impulsive with a few anger control issues. After a high-speed chase and appearing in front of a judge, she finds herself in jail with a variety of interesting characters.

programme.title: Movie: Madea's Witness Protection
programme.desc: A New York City banker puts his family into a witness protection program at his aunt's home when he is set up as the instigator of his company's fraudulent scheme.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: No Good Deeds
programme.desc: With Rob's baby only a month away, the family is excited to celebrate and go all out to plan a baby shower for the couple, but, when Rob and Chyna get into a fight, the party is ruined.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Time to Dash
programme.desc: During a trip to Miami, a major department store makes an offer to buy Dash that leads to Kim, Kourtney, and Khloé arguing about the store's future. Later, Kourtney struggles to enjoy herself around Scott and Khloé keeps her new relationship from Kim.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Paris
programme.desc: Kourtney is eager to experience Paris Fashion Week with Kim and see Kendall walk the runway for the first time, but their trip to the city of love takes a dark turn when Kim is robbed at gunpoint.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Aftermath
programme.desc: In the aftermath of the Paris incident, Kim struggles to cope with frightening reminders of the robbery, Kendall wrestles over her decision to prosecute an unstable trespasser, and Kris makes it her mission to heighten security for the entire family.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Beginnings and Endings
programme.desc: Khloe and Tristan run into some roadblocks in the process of expanding their family, Scott faces some big decisions about his relationship, and Kim prepares for a test that will determine her future as a lawyer.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: No Comment
programme.desc: When Scott accidentally causes some speculation that Khloe and Tristan are back together, Khloe is overwhelmed by the backlash online. The family worries that Kim is going through a difficult time and tries to cheer her up. Kendall has baby fever.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Winners Take All
programme.desc: Kim and Khloe think old flames are brewing between Kourtney and Scott and take it upon themselves to set them up on a romantic date. The Kardashian girls challenge the Jenners to an obstacle course. Kris and Corey agree to abstain from sex.

programme.title: Overserved with Lisa Vanderpump: A Tuscan Feast: Joel McHale and Cheryl Hines
programme.desc: Lisa creates an al fresco Tuscan feast for two hilarious guests: Italian-born Joel McHale and actress Cheryl Hines. The day includes a mystery blindfold game, flaming cheese pasta, and Lisa confronting Joel about things he's said about her in the past.

programme.title: Overserved with Lisa Vanderpump: Diva Tea: Iggy Azalea and Trixie Mattel
programme.desc: Lisa throws a proper English Tea with some very improper conversation as Iggy Azalea and Trixie Mattel share tales of red carpet underwear fails, one-night stands, and a famous baby daddy!

programme.title: Movie: The Waterboy
programme.desc: A waterboy becomes a football sensation when a coach discovers his talent.

programme.title: Movie: The 40-Year-Old Virgin
programme.desc: Andy Stitzer is 40 years old and has never had sex. His friends decide to make it their mission to rectify the situation, but they hit a roadblock when Andy falls in love with a mother of three who doesn't want sex to enter their relationship.

programme.title: Movie: The Waterboy
programme.desc: A waterboy becomes a football sensation when a coach discovers his talent.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: $12 Meal Showdown
programme.desc: Guy Fieri pushes the culinary limits of four Flavortown rookies by challenging them to cook a day's worth of meals with a budget of just $12 for each round.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Guy's Carnival Games
programme.desc: Guy Fieri invites four carnival food-loving chefs to play carnival classics, Grocery Games-style. First, he turns a popular strength test game into a finesse challenge to determine which ingredient the chefs must feature in their classic carnival treat.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Tastier at Home
programme.desc: Four chefs walk Guy virtually through one of their dishes. In this episode, there's a French dip from Seattle, San Diego arancini, Boston kabobs and bangin' shrimp all the way from North Pole, Alaska.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: All Kinds of Comfort
programme.desc: This trip, Guy dives into all kinds of comfort cooking. In Phoenix a funky joint stacks up barbecue fries and a new spin on chilaquiles. In Boulder a pizza place loads up the pies with their meatball grinder.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Ocean Coasts and Great Lakes
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's going from coast to coast and to the Great Lakes to dig up some dynamite dishes. In Los Angeles, a Mexican joint in Grand Central Market serves outrageous octopus tostadas and puts a lights-out spin on a burger.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Burger and Breakfast
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri's going from breakfast to burgers. In Vancouver, British Columbia, a pie shop bakin' up both sweet and savory sensations. In Chico, California, a morning hot spot pumping up French toast and spicing up potatoes.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Filling Up on Philly
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri is filling up on a taste of Philadelphia. There's a funky malt house serving Buffalo wings and a Polish twist on the cheesesteak. Plus, a long time tavern making real deal Italian recipes and a stop for Indonesian specialities.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Sicilian and Seafood
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's going from incredible Italian to sensational seafood. In Oklahoma City, a funky food truck putting out wood-fired pizza and grandma's Sicilian meatball recipe.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Australian to Asian
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's hitting the road and grabbing all kinds of worldwide flavour. In Kauai, Hawaii, a Japanese-Hawaiian spot putting a quick spin on fish, burgers and burritos. In Kansas City, Mo., an Australian bakery cookin' up Down Under comfort food.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Tacos, Turtles and Tri-Tip
programme.desc: Guy tries pork belly tacos and carne adovada in a high-energy marketplace.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Not Your Typical Joints
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's going off the beaten path to check out some funky finds. In Charlotte, N.C., an eatery tucked inside a beer store slings crazy waffle creations. In Houston, a not-your-everyday fusion joint mashes up killer barbecue with sushi.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: All Day Dining
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy gets a taste of every meal. In Long Beach, California, he's served some delicious short ribs.
