programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Chop Chop
programme.desc: Trisha and her sister, Beth, love cooking competition shows so they decide to hold one in their own kitchen in this new episode. Beth puts together a mystery basket for Trisha, who uses the ingredients to make an appetizer, main course and dessert.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Bringin' Home The Farm
programme.desc: Trisha and her sister head out to a local farm to enjoy its bounty of fresh ingredients.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Say Hello To The Flavors Of Spring
programme.desc: Valerie prepares a meal of spring delights for her husband and friends.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: All the Colors of the Rainbow
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli is celebrating spring's colourful bounty by creating a visual feast that delights the senses and her guest, The Kitchen's Katie Lee. The menu includes golden raspberry goat cheese crostini, roasted rainbow carrots, and more.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Spring is Sprung
programme.desc: It's springtime and Ree's cooking up seasonal Glazed Baked Ham for a Sunday brunch. To wrap up a day's spring cleaning, there's fabulous Fried Chicken and a brilliant bonfire.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Easy Entertaining
programme.desc: Ree hosts a cooking and eating get-together with her Oklahoma City Thunder friends. The menu includes white spinach artichoke lasagna and a butternut kale salad.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Spring Potluck Faves
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is making spring favorites to share at her church potluck. She starts with get-ahead glazed pineapple ham slices and tosses a primavera pasta salad with lemon and parmesan dressing. Her caramelized onion dip is a crowd pleaser.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home: Crazy 8's
programme.desc: Ree Drummond and the kids serve up some awesome eats with just 8 ingredients. There's a colorful clementine sprinkle cake, a creamy and crunchy easy chicken tot pie, cheesy stuffed pasta and a shortcut speedy dumpling soup.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Midwest Mom
programme.desc: Molly Yeh makes some easy Midwest staples to keep everyone going on the farm. She starts with carrot cake baked oatmeal and then makes a French fry-covered busy day hotdish, pea and bacon salad with French dressing and rocky road fudge for dessert.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Spring Feast
programme.desc: Molly Yeh makes a delicious farm spread to celebrate the arrival of spring with her family. She's making homemade herbed pasta with feta, lemon and pine nuts, hearty meatballs with garlic yogurt and chimichurri, and spring apple and fennel salad.

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown: Delicious Miss Brown
programme.desc: Kardea Brown cooks up a fresh veggie and herb-inspired meal that includes Veggie soul rolls stuffed with collard greens, carrots, cabbage and rice. Plus, Kardea grills lamb chops with a mint pesto and makes a no-bake Carolina mud pie.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Springtime in Nashville
programme.desc: Trisha prepares a spring feast that makes use of fresh produce.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Recipes by Request
programme.desc: The Kitchen hosts are taking requests for easy, new and creative recipes, starting with easy smothered chicken and grilled red curry lamb chops. There's also a perfect chocolate cake with easy chocolate frosting.

programme.title: The Great Food Truck Race: Gold Rush
programme.desc: The four remaining teams pan for gold to earn their seed money, and some teams gain a clear head start on shopping and selling. Meanwhile, extreme cold and winds continue to challenge everyone.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Sandwich Showcase
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's on the road to grab some serious sandwiches. In Austin, a rock-n-roll brunch bar adding a funky touch to meatloaf and a Monte Cristo. Plus, a Texas joint putting some '90s hip hop into their stacked-up specialties.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Savory Sensations
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's warming up with some standout specialties. In Brooklyn, N.Y., the mom and pop diner flipping a skillet apple waffle with pancetta and deep-frying breakfast empanadas.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Italian, Hawaiian and Colombian
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri's digging into a multicultural flavour fest. In Hawaii, a poke place is knocking it out of the park with their island specialties. In San Carlos, California, a crazy Italian spot putting tasty twists on their homemade pasta.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Surf 'n' Turf Jackpot
programme.desc: Guy hits the surf 'n' turf jackpot in Mississippi and Oahu. He tries some tasty ribs, fritters as well as pork rinds.

programme.title: The Zoo: Porcupine Blind Date

programme.title: North Woods Law: Cold Case
programme.desc: Officers Bronson and Lucas help state police investigate a 19-year-old missing person case. A landowner requests help with a group of squatters on an island in the Connecticut River. And, Officer Towne comes to the aid of an injured hawk.

programme.title: North Woods Law: No Way Out

programme.title: North Woods Law: Stubborn as a Moose
programme.desc: Sgt. Lopashanski attempts every trick in the book to wrangle a stubborn moose off of a busy roadway. Officer Canfield plays a game of cat and mouse with a suspected illegal deer hunter, and Officer McKee and Demler investigate an illegal turkey kill.

programme.title: North Woods Law: In the Thick of It
programme.desc: At the state's largest ice fishing derby, Officer Canfield looks for the owner of a frozen fishing line while Major Juneau takes command of a mountain rescue. Officer McKee runs radar for snowmobiles. And Officer Cyrs checks on a moose in a bog.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Bump in the Road
programme.desc: Lt. Boudreau and Officer Hannett have an unusually busy day on ATV patrol. Officer McDermott investigates a man who illegally shot a rabbit in a residential area. Officers Holmes and Cyrs use ATVs to rescue an injured hiker on Mount Carter.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Crash Course
programme.desc: In Galveston County, a feisty gator needs a new home. Sneaky shrimpers try to conceal their catch. A family's property is damaged by stray bullets. On Lake Texoma, the game wardens stage a boat crash.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Justice Served
programme.desc: Game Wardens stay busy patrolling all over the state of Texas. On Lake Sam Rayburn, a water patrol turns into a cry for help. The wardens serve a warrant to a man who illegally shot a hog. A drug arrest leads a game warden into a manhunt.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Back Road Bait
programme.desc: It's snapper season on the Gulf, and as fishermen catch fish, game wardens catch fishermen who are breaking the law. Two men are investigated for cruelty to a wild pig, a jet ski collision leads to arguments, and an exotic tortoise finds a new home.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Pelicans and Poachers

programme.title: Movie: Life
programme.desc: Prisoners at Mississippi's Parchman Farm reminisce about two inmates who were framed by a corrupt sheriff years ago for a murder they didn't commit. The odd duo spent 65 years together, squabbling and trying to escape their confines to no avail.

programme.title: Movie: Big Momma's House 2

programme.title: Movie: Big Mommas: Like Father, Like Son

programme.title: Dateline: The Match
programme.desc: A high school girl is nearly beaten to death in her home and goes under hypnosis to identify her attacker.

programme.title: Movie: Independence Day: Resurgence
programme.desc: Twenty years after the first invasion, a massive alien force invades Earth, following a distress signal sent by the original army. Blowing through Earth's new defenses, the invaders ravage the planet. It is up to a band of pilots to save the world.

programme.title: Movie: Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse
programme.desc: 13-year-old Miles Morales may look like an ordinary teen, but he has a secret identity: he's Spider-Man! When a mishap at a supercollider pulls him into an alternate dimension, he learns that he's far from the only Spider-Person in the multiverse.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homer vs. Lisa and the 8th Commandment
programme.desc: Homer gets an illegal cable hook-up and Lisa refuses to watch for fear of losing her soul.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homer the Heretic
programme.desc: Homer decides to forgo church and starts his own religion by spending Sundays reading Playdude and smoking cigars.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Bart Sells His Soul
programme.desc: Bart's faith is tested when he sells his soul for five dollars. Moe transforms Moe's Tavern into a family restaurant, with mixed results.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Lisa the Skeptic
programme.desc: Lisa unearths a skeleton in the meadow where a new mega-mall is being constructed.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Simpsons Bible Stories
programme.desc: The Simpsons fall asleep at church and dream of themselves as characters from the Bible.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Faith Off
programme.desc: When Homer gets his head stuck in a bucket of glue, the family attempts to save him.

programme.title: The Simpsons: I'm Goin' to Praiseland
programme.desc: Homer and Ned Flanders build a Bible-themed park as a tribute to Ned's late wife, Maude.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Thank God It's Doomsday
programme.desc: A religious movie and subsequent coincidences convince Homer that the Rapture is nigh, and the folks of Springfield, God love 'em, take him at his word.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Gone Maggie Gone
programme.desc: When Homer leaves Maggie on the doorstep of a convent to keep her safe while rescuing Santa's Little Helper, the nuns at the convent take Maggie in. Lisa comes up with a plan to infiltrate the convent and rescue Maggie.

programme.title: The Simpsons: A Tree Grows in Springfield
programme.desc: Lisa tries to cheer up a down-in-the-dumps Homer by winning him a 'MyPad' at the school auction. But he falls back into a funk when he breaks the magical tablet device.

programme.title: Planet Earth II: Cities
programme.desc: Rooted on the slope of a rocky hill in Namaqualand, South Africa stands The Namaqua Rock Fig Tree. with the ability to withstand the unforgiving conditions of the surrounding desolate landscape, and with minimal rainfall, it is a testament to survival.

programme.title: Planet Earth II: Islands
programme.desc: For some, remote islands offer sanctuary away from the mainland: the tiny pygmy three-toed sloth only survives because of the peace and safety offered by its Caribbean island home, while seabirds like albatross thrive in predator-free isolation.

programme.title: Planet Earth II: Mountains
programme.desc: In this episode we climb high into the world's great mountain ranges. Only a few pioneering animals have what it takes to survive up here, they are amongst the most elusive and mysterious on the planet.

programme.title: Planet Earth II: Jungles
programme.desc: Jungles are the richest places on Earth. A magical world of surprise, drama and unforgettable wild characters. From the jungles of Brazil to Costa Rica, watch as the animals face life in the most competitive place on Earth.

programme.title: Planet Earth II: Deserts
programme.desc: In this episode we visit the world's deserts, a land of extremes that pushes life to the limit. Animals here have developed ingenious ways of dealing with the hostile conditions giving rise to the most incredible survival stories on Earth.

programme.title: Planet Earth II: Grasslands
programme.desc: Grasslands cover one quarter of all land and support the greatest gatherings of wildlife on Earth. The extraordinary creatures that live here must survive the most hostile seasons on the planet.

programme.title: Wonders of the Moon
programme.desc: An exploration of the stunning medley of lunar delights from across the globe, including blood moons, super moons, and total eclipses. Low light cameras reveal the moon in its natural light, and illustrate its extraordinary influence.

programme.title: South Pacific: Fragile Paradise
programme.desc: The South Pacific is still relatively healthy and teeming with fish, but it is a fragile paradise. Discover the insidious threats to these bountiful seas and what is being done to preserve the ocean and its wildlife.

programme.title: South Pacific: Castaways
programme.desc: Learn how some of the most isolated islands became habited.

programme.title: South Pacific: Endless Blue
programme.desc: Much of the South Pacific is a marine desert, but some areas support diverse life. Following how the ocean creatures survive the harsh conditions they live in.

programme.title: South Pacific: Ocean of Volcanoes
programme.desc: The birth, growth and death of an island in the South Pacific.

programme.title: South Pacific: Strange Islands
programme.desc: On the isolated islands of the South Pacific, wildlife has evolved in extraordinary ways, but island living may carry a high price because when new species arrive, all hell breaks loose.

programme.desc: A farmhand accidentally becomes responsible for opening up the gateway between humans and giants, putting the princess in jeopardy.

programme.title: Movie: Cloverfield

programme.title: Movie: Battle Los Angeles

programme.title: Dr. Oakley: Yukon Vet: Don't Cry She-Wolf

programme.title: Secrets of the Zoo: North Carolina: Chimp Off the Old Block
programme.desc: Zoo keepers prepare for a chimp birth, while vets investigate a bear's mystery illness.

programme.title: Secrets of the Zoo: North Carolina: Dr. Zoo-Little
programme.desc: A gorilla has emergency surgery, while zoo keepers try to take blood from a lion's tail.

programme.title: Secrets of the Zoo: Tampa: Iguana Be Your Friend
programme.desc: In this week’s episode, several of the ZooTampa animals are on the move to new habitats.

programme.title: Secrets of the Zoo: A Cold Day in Tampa
programme.desc: The ZooTampa team prepares the animals for the wintry Florida weather.

programme.title: Secrets of the Zoo: Tampa: Two and a Calf Kittens
programme.desc: The youngsters are causing trouble! A very pregnant rhino waits and waits to give birth, two orphaned panther kittens explore new environments, and a young zebra tries to dodge a checkup.

programme.title: Secrets of the Zoo: Rhino-mite!
programme.desc: There are surprising results when a white rhino gets an ultrasound.

programme.title: Secrets of the Zoo: Beauties and the Beasts
programme.desc: There's baby fever at the zoo when the cheetah repopulation program goes into effect.

programme.title: Secrets of the Zoo: Welcome to the Family
programme.desc: The staff at the Columbus Zoo can hardly contain themselves as they prepare to make a home for an orphaned baby gorilla.

programme.title: Secrets of the Zoo: Love Is a Cheetah Cub
programme.desc: The Columbus Zoo and Aquarium makes room for three adorable new cheetah cubs.

programme.title: Secrets of the Zoo: Cheetah Play Date
programme.desc: Two of the zoo's cats receive some high-tech assistance in the baby-making department.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Are Aliens Attacking Our Nuclear Arsenal?
programme.desc: Across the globe, senior military personnel witness UFOs above nuclear weapons bases and in some cases UFOs are reported to shut down nuclear missiles.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Forbidden Land of the Giants
programme.desc: In Borjami Valley, a team of experts uncover bones they believe belongs to a human that is over nine feet tall. Also, strange reports of a large, underwater creature have come from people living near the remote Lake Labynkyr in Siberia.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Alien Flights of Horror
programme.desc: Across America run-ins between planes and UFO's are reported, sometimes with terrifying and tragic consequences. Find out if there is danger in our skies and if the government is covering up the truth behind these encounters.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Warrior Fortress Mystery
programme.desc: Satellite images reveal a mountaintop structure in Scotland that appears to be a centuries-old fortified settlement; an investigation uncovers ancient stone carvings that may link the site to one of the most enigmatic warrior civilizations in history.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: War of the Galaxies
programme.desc: Galaxies are locked in continual combat across the universe, and our own Milky Way will face its biggest opponent ever, the Andromeda Galaxy, in a titanic and deadly struggle that could create a new and unrecognizable super galaxy.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Hidden Tomb of Genghis Khan
programme.desc: A strange structure is found in the heartlands of Mongolia. Find out if it is the lost tomb of Genghis Khan. Bizarre rings in Spain could lead to the lost city of Atlantis and a huge floating island is on a collision course with New Zealand.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Mayan Armageddon: The New Evidence
programme.desc: New evidence might reveal how the Mayans vanished. When scientists investigate an abandoned settlement, they discover traces of ritualistic drug binges from the ancient world. A mysterious symbol in the desert points to a sex cult of millionaires.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Finding Jack the Ripper
programme.desc: New discoveries from space give experts new clues in the hunt for Jack the Ripper. When a strange object crash-lands in Antarctica, experts speculate it could be an alien visitor.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Hidden Tomb of Genghis Khan
programme.desc: A strange structure is found in the heartlands of Mongolia. Find out if it is the lost tomb of Genghis Khan. Bizarre rings in Spain could lead to the lost city of Atlantis and a huge floating island is on a collision course with New Zealand.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Aztec Alien Mystery
programme.desc: When satellite images reveal spot a strange white substance in the land of the Aztecs, experts investigate the site for extraterrestrial connections; what they find could explain the rise of one of the world's greatest civilizations.

programme.title: How It's Made: Graphite Pencil Leads, Clarinets, Special Effects
programme.desc: Learn how they make graphite pencil leads, clarinets and special effects.

programme.title: How It's Made: Cookware, Biodiesel, Clothes Hangers, Insulation
programme.desc: Learn how they make cast iron cookware, clothes hangers and stone wool insulation.

programme.title: How It's Made: Audio Tubes, Shredders, Model Aircraft, Snare Drums
programme.desc: Find out how audio tubes, shredders, model aircraft, and snare drums are made.

programme.title: How It's Made: Aluminum Screw Caps, Chocolate, Pills, Pasta
programme.desc: Aluminum screw caps, chocolate, pills and pasta are some of the most common items around today. Find out how they are made.

programme.title: How It's Made: Metal Golf Clubs, Waffles, Custom Wires and Cables Train Wheels
programme.desc: Learn how they make metal gold clubs, train wheels and custom wires and cables.

programme.title: How It's Made: Fire Fighter Boots, Garden Tools, Automated Machines, Gypsum Boards
programme.desc: Discover how firefighter boots are constructed and how garden tools are forged.

programme.title: How It's Made: Skeletal Replicas, Ice Buckets and Servers, Dining Chairs, In Ground Pools
programme.desc: Mark Tewksbury shows viewers how some familiar objects of everyday life are made.

programme.title: How It's Made: Drill Bits, Photo Booths, Stamps
programme.desc: Learn how drill bits, photo booths and stamps are made.

programme.title: How It's Made: Native Healing Drums, Raisins, Stereoscopic Viewers, Ribbon Microphones
programme.desc: Find out how native healing drums, raisins, stereoscopic viewers and ribbon microphones are made.

programme.title: How It's Made: Pocket Knives, Soapstone products, Electric Pole transformers, and traditional snowshoes
programme.desc: Features pocket knives, soapstone products, electric pole transformers and traditional snowshoes.

programme.title: How It's Made: Fur Tanning, Photographs, Welding Electrodes and Electric Violins
programme.desc: Common items have unlikely beginnings. Learn the secrets behind fur tanning, photographs, welding electrodes and electric violins.

programme.title: How It's Made: Nail Nippers, Jade Putters, Ice Cider, and Water Skis
programme.desc: Nail nippers, jade putters, ice ciders, and water skis are made.

programme.title: Mega Machines: Sea Monsters: Harbor Traffic Control
programme.desc: As the demand for goods has increased, container ships are getting larger and ports are becoming increasingly congested. See the daring harbor pilots and others who work to control the incredibly crowded traffic on today's water highways.

programme.title: Epic Engineering: World's Strongest Ship
programme.desc: The world's biggest container ship can haul the record-breaking loads across the planet, and its expert engineering and cutting-edge technology help delivery heavy cargo despite the ocean's dangers and challenges.

programme.title: Building Giants: World's Biggest Cargo Ship
programme.desc: A team of expert engineers must build the world's largest cargo ship in just 12 months, and to do so, they use cutting-edge technology and the latest construction methods in a race to complete the massive project on schedule.

programme.title: Richard Hammond's Big: Monster Ship Confidential
programme.desc: Richard Hammond joins the crew of one of the biggest ships on earth, a monster cargo vessel that uses cutting-edge engineering and the latest tech to deliver vital materials on a non-stop 28,000-mile voyage.

programme.title: How It's Made: Patterned Glass Panels, Road Cases, Stop-Frame Animation
programme.desc: Find out how patterned glass panels, road cases and stop-frame animation are created.

programme.title: How It's Made: Fire Extinguishers, Doughnuts, Shock Absorbers and Banjos
programme.desc: Features fire extinguishers, doughnuts, shock absorbers and banjos.

programme.title: How It's Made: Electrophoretic Displays, Dry Erase Boards, Air Rifles, Quartz Countertops
programme.desc: Mark Tewksbury shows viewers how some familiar objects of everyday life are made.

programme.title: How It's Made: Motorcycle Goggles, Handbuilt Jukeboxes, Vacuum Excavators & Shaving Sets
programme.desc: Mark Tewksbury shows viewers how some familiar objects of everyday life are made.

programme.title: How It's Made: Three-Wheel Electric Bikes, Skin Cream, Patio Heaters and Wood-Spoke Wheels
programme.desc: This episode includes 3-wheel electric bikes, skin cream, patio heaters and wood-spoke wheels.

programme.title: How It's Made: Potash, Leather Bracelets, Wild Rice, and Hex Key L Wrenches
programme.desc: This episode features potash, leather bracelets, wild rice, and hex key L wrenches.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Lust to Dust
programme.desc: After her husband dies suddenly, a woman becomes the relentless target of her overly flirtatious neighbor. When her brother moves in to protect her, he's put on a collision course with the neighbor that will only be resolved with bloodshed.

programme.title: Shattered: The House on Hamilton Avenue
programme.desc: In 2006, Officer Mike Kermon is the first to arrive at a house on Hamilton Avenue where neighbors believe shots have been fired. As he enters the quiet home, he has no idea that what he'll find inside will change his life forever.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Branches of Evil
programme.desc: Tray Phelps, a beloved father, son and fiancée was found beaten to death in his own driveway. The small town of Hayti, Missouri is stunned to discover that a web of evil lurks just beneath the surface of the seemingly idyllic hamlet.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Money Can't Buy You Love
programme.desc: When a local resident of Dunlap, Tennessee is picking up cans, he makes the shocking discovery of a murder victim's body floating in the river. Authorities must discover first who the deceased is and then who could have committed the horrendous crime.

programme.title: American Monster: Life in Florida
programme.desc: Wealthy and glamorous 72-year-old widow Jean Schwarzkopf is determined not to give up on life and is soon a fixture on the Florida social scene. But when Jean's new friends are not all they seem her family is drawn into a dark world of crime and violence.

programme.title: American Monster: Nothing Can Stop Us
programme.desc: Tattoo artist Amber Andrews and snowboarder Brandon Duran have a tumultuous marriage. When love turns to venomous hate, a shocking secret breaks the surface and reveals a betrayal that leads to murder.

programme.title: American Monster: Ghost From the Past
programme.desc: Best friends Julie Marange and Kristin Dargis are like sisters. So, when Julie falls for Kristin's brother, George, it seems to be the perfect romance. But both soon realize that escaping the past takes more than love - and can lead to fatal consequences.

programme.title: American Monster: Take Me to the River
programme.desc: Coming home from church, a local preacher finds his wife brutally stabbed and beaten, the apparent victim of a home invasion. His alibi is sound, as are their two grown sons. However, several details just don't add up. The truth shocks everyone.

programme.title: American Monster: Stand by Your Men
programme.desc: After moving to a remote town in Colorado, Ron and Cynthia Phillips and their four children try to adjust. But their never-aired home videos mask darker impulses within their family - ones that would lead to a complex web of deceit, infidelity and murder.

programme.title: American Monster: Shooting Phoenix
programme.desc: A monster stalks the summer streets of Phoenix in 2005. With never-before-seen footage, we get a glimpse into the killer's life and how he's able to hide in plain sight. Can police catch him before he strikes again?

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Branches of Evil
programme.desc: Tray Phelps, a beloved father, son and fiancée was found beaten to death in his own driveway. The small town of Hayti, Missouri is stunned to discover that a web of evil lurks just beneath the surface of the seemingly idyllic hamlet.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Murder in Store
programme.desc: Jerry Barker falls hard for Rebecca after the death of his first wife-and together they open a general store. But the shelf-life on their happiness is short-lived—and when it comes to murder, practice doesn't make perfect.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Unholy Trinity
programme.desc: Amanda and Tonch Weldon seem like the quintessential Iowa farming couple. But behind closed doors, their cravings are quite kinky. Their secret swinging lifestyle works well for years… Until one day a deadly love triangle emerges.

programme.title: Deadly Devotion: Temple of Doom
programme.desc: 20-year-old Steve Bryant thinks he's found his calling among the peaceful, robe-wearing Hare Krishna community. But when he defies a despotic renegade guru, Bryant learns that ultimate devotion has a dark and deadly side.

programme.title: Deadly Devotion: The War Within
programme.desc: A trusting teenager has no idea that her first love is part of a dangerous militia group with terrifying plans to kill.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: No Remorse
programme.desc: Robin Sowders is brutally beaten in his home in Bloomington, Indiana and later dies from his injuries. When his wife turns up at the police station, the investigation turns on its head. Only a wiretap will eventually reveal the truth.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: Buried at the Ranch
programme.desc: In Arlington, Texas, Michael Humphreys and Sandra Walton are brutally gunned down. Detectives don't know who the intended victim was but when they discover recordings of phone conversations with one of the victims, they get the break they need.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: We're Watching You
programme.desc: 40 year-old Rachael Anderson, mother of four, calls an old friend one Friday evening in April 2010 about a home improvement project she'd never complete. Eight years later, she's still missing, and two men are behind bars.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: High School Horror
programme.desc: When the body of beautiful high school student Debbie Gama is discovered in a creek wrapped in wire, the ensuing investigation ends up uncovering more than her murderer, revealing a secret world of twisted sex, drugs, sadomasochism and bondage.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: This Guy's Getting Paranoid
programme.desc: Roaa Al-Dhanoon has disappeared. What begins as a missing persons case, takes a disturbing turn by someone who is closest to her. Now, detectives must unravel a complex web of deceit that continues to strike fear throughout the devastated community.

programme.title: Diabolical: Caught in the Cover-Up
programme.desc: In West Bloomfield, Michigan, a simple affair between two coworkers turns complex as the two lovers are willing to do anything...even commit murder... to protect their darkest secret.

programme.title: Diabolical: Caught in the Cover-Up
programme.desc: In West Bloomfield, Michigan, a simple affair between two coworkers turns complex as the two lovers are willing to do anything...even commit murder... to protect their darkest secret.

programme.title: American Monster: It Was All of Them
programme.desc: The Futos are a close-knit family of five who film their lives over many decades. But when four of them are found brutally murdered, the investigation into the slayings will uncover a terrible truth and a family secret that has laid buried for decades.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: He Still Haunts Me
programme.desc: An extended interview with Gwen Bailey, who married Norman Starnes thinking she landed the most eligible bachelor in town. Years later, she discovered she never really knew him at all, but by then, she was already his unwilling accomplice.

programme.title: Military UFO Encounters
programme.desc: When it comes to identifying mysterious, unknown objects in our skies, there are few more qualified than pilots and astronauts. Through amazing first-hand accounts we'll learn that sightings by these experts are far more common than we're lead to believe.

programme.title: UFOs: Uncovering the Truth: Deathbed Confessions
programme.desc: Deathbed confessions have provided a wealth of new evidence to UFO researchers from top intelligence, government and scientific witnesses who were sworn to secrecy in life, but couldn't leave this earth without revealing the truth.

programme.title: Ancient UFO Encounters
programme.desc: Uncovering new evidence pointing to the possibility that ancient man was visited by extraterrestrials and influenced ancient technologies, architecture and art.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Fallujah: The Taking of Terror Central
programme.desc: Operation Phantom Fury was meant to be a 48 hour battle but insurgents, armed with IEDs and a stockpile of grenades, fought back. US forces faced one of the toughest urban conflicts since Vietnam as they tried to reclaim the city.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Khe Sanh: Marines Under Siege
programme.desc: Six thousand outnumbered marines fight for survival against a vast, highly trained Communist army in a bloody 77 day siege. It's a battle that will shape the course of the war in Vietnam.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Chosin: One Way Out
programme.desc: Trapped and outnumbered seven to one early in the Korean War, US Marines must fight their way out or die.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Midway: Taking Back the Pacific
programme.desc: June 1942, six months after Pearl Harbour, the battle of Midway will change the course of history and the Pacific war. The Americans take on the most powerful navy in the world, and win.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Khe Sanh: Marines Under Siege
programme.desc: Six thousand outnumbered marines fight for survival against a vast, highly trained Communist army in a bloody 77 day siege. It's a battle that will shape the course of the war in Vietnam.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Chosin: One Way Out
programme.desc: Trapped and outnumbered seven to one early in the Korean War, US Marines must fight their way out or die.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Midway: Taking Back the Pacific
programme.desc: June 1942, six months after Pearl Harbour, the battle of Midway will change the course of history and the Pacific war. The Americans take on the most powerful navy in the world, and win.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Fallujah: The Taking of Terror Central
programme.desc: Operation Phantom Fury was meant to be a 48 hour battle but insurgents, armed with IEDs and a stockpile of grenades, fought back. US forces faced one of the toughest urban conflicts since Vietnam as they tried to reclaim the city.

programme.title: Ancient UFO Encounters
programme.desc: Uncovering new evidence pointing to the possibility that ancient man was visited by extraterrestrials and influenced ancient technologies, architecture and art.

programme.title: UFOs: Uncovering the Truth: Deathbed Confessions
programme.desc: Deathbed confessions have provided a wealth of new evidence to UFO researchers from top intelligence, government and scientific witnesses who were sworn to secrecy in life, but couldn't leave this earth without revealing the truth.

programme.title: Nazi Jihad
programme.desc: As Allied forces close in on Germany, the Nazi dream looks to be over. However, two men will carry Hitler's vision beyond Germany: Otto Skorzeny and Amin Al Husseini. From their Nazi stronghold in the Middle East, these men create a new kind of terror.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: Conspiracy on Death Island
programme.desc: A strange, abandoned mansion on a remote island is central to countless conspiracy theories, and new discoveries reveal if this eerie site was a secret Nazi base intended for a sinister mission.

programme.title: Mad Science: Nazi Killer Bugs
programme.desc: Hitler famously said he was against biological weapons, but new evidence shows the Nazis were colluding with experts on germ warfare. They had a deadly plan to launch a disease attack on the Allies that could have even changed the course of the war.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Himmler's Empire of Terror
programme.desc: Hitler's bid for power depends on his most loyal, and violent supporters: the SS. Using surveillance, detention, and even murder, they defeat political enemies and are most responsible for putting Hitler's deadly policy of racial purity into practice.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: Mystery of the Nazi Nukes
programme.desc: When a secret bunker and a vast network of tunnels are discovered after World War II, experts use cutting-edge tech to uncover if the high levels of radiation in the area could be connected to a classified Nazi nuclear program.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Fury
programme.desc: On June 28, 1914, the assassination of an obscure Austrian archduke in Sarajevo triggers the most disastrous conflict the world has ever known. Germany becomes an enemy to France, invades Belgium and, in September, arrives at the gates of Paris.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Fear
programme.desc: The French Army stops the German advance at the battle of the Marne while the Germans halt the Russians at the Tannenberg on the eastern front.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Hell
programme.desc: War descends into hell. The battlefield becomes a slaughterhouse. After 16 months of fighting, five million men are dead. Despite this, neither side has gained any ground until a new and terrifying machine rolls onto the battlefield: the tank.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Rage
programme.desc: People have had enough of the war and uprisings are brewing. German submarine attacks provoke the Americans, but they arrive too late to prevent the Battle of Passchendaele.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Deliverance
programme.desc: All seems lost for the Allies. The Italians are defeated at Caporette, and a Bolshevik Russia pulls out of the war. But the American reinforcements are decisive, and the Allies emerge victorious.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Bulge: Holding the Line
programme.desc: In December 1944, 83,000 Americans are assaulted by 200,000 Germans through thick snow and fog in the Ardennes forest. What follows is the biggest and bloodiest battle of World War II: the Battle of the Bulge.

programme.title: Fixer Upper: Family Seeks Spacious Upgrade

programme.title: Fixer Upper: A Modern Cabin Makeover
programme.desc: Chip and Joanna team up with their friend Jimmy Don to transform a bland little house into a modern mountain cabin for his son. The project quickly turns into one of the most unique renovations yet with a little help from former first lady Laura Bush.

programme.title: Fixer Upper: New Chapter for Family of Four

programme.title: Fixer Upper: A Classic, Traditional Beauty
programme.desc: A couple moves from Oregon to Waco, Texas, and enlist the help of Chip and Jo to transform their bland, outdated home.

programme.title: Fixer Upper: Big Budget for a Big House
programme.desc: A couple has narrowed down their search to three homes that would work for their family of five. They task Chip and Jo with determining which house has the most renovation potential for their all-in budget of $850,000.

programme.title: Fixer Upper: Rock Star Renovation
programme.desc: Musician Mike Herrera and his wife, Holli, are moving from Washington state to Waco so they can be closer to Holli's family. They need a house with plenty of space for their two children and a large music studio for Mike.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Welcome to the Jungle
programme.desc: The crew takes on the challenge of bringing the jungle to life in a suburban backyard.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Living Under the Sea
programme.desc: Pool designer Lucas Congdon must create an outdoor water room in which a mermaid could live. Former clients in love with all things ocean ask Lucas to remodel the tiny pool in their new home that sits just yards away from the Gulf of Mexico.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Castle by the Sea
programme.desc: Lucas faces an epic challenge building a pool fit for a Roman palace on the Gulf of Mexico. Lucas journeys far outside his comfort zone and even taps Emperor Caesar for help on his quest to fulfill his clients' dream of living in a castle by the sea.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Green With Envy
programme.desc: Lucas and the crew have their work cut out for them as a client's demands leave him reluctant. A Caribbean destination that includes green rocks and a sand bottom salt-water pool is the client's request.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Swimming With the Fishes
programme.desc: The Lucas Lagoons crew creates a backyard oasis in Siesta Key. They take an old, outdated pool and transform it into a natural lagoon.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Boneyard Punch List
programme.desc: While Mark is on the road drumming up new business, the guys pick off a list of chores on the Boneyard, including stacking the Hamlin cabin. Meanwhile, Mark checks out the most incredible hand-hewn timber-frame barn he's ever seen.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Part of the Family
programme.desc: The guys head to Bronston, Kentucky, to check out a 150-year-old, double-pen farmhouse built by their client's great-grandfather. She hopes to preserve her pioneer heritage, so the crew takes care to save every log possible.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Mark Finds His Dream Home Barn
programme.desc: After years of searching, Mark Bowe has found the barn he wants to turn into his own home. The guys work carefully to take apart the enormous bank barn without breaking any of the beams. Mark visits a nearby barn that has been transformed for weddings.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Cabin at a Crossroads
programme.desc: Mark finds a cabin from a unique moment in history when pioneers started using new technology: the sawmill. Later, Mark visits another West Virginia cabin filled with family memories.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Fancy Cabin Takedown in Minor Hill
programme.desc: Mark Bowe and his crew work through layers of architectural history to uncover an original pioneer home. They hear stories from family members who lived in the cabin. Mark also visits a beautifully restored log home with its own extensive history.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: The Egg Files
programme.desc: Crack the mysterious egg case and pursue a higher understanding of this amazing ovoid.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: Flat Is Beautiful II: The Reload
programme.desc: Alton Brown gives the 'reload' treatment to a show about flattened meat dishes, including a new chicken piccata and a chicken Kiev that's actually a schnitzel.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Southern Staples
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson knows that you just can't beat authentic Southern cooking. Whether it's hearty and savory breakfasts, traditional and delicious low-country cuisine or sweet desserts, it’s a full day of your favorite Southern staples.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Campus Cravings
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson might miss college football and parties, but most importantly, he misses the food. No matter the time, day or night, you can always find some of the best bites around to satisfy your campus cravings.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Los Angeles
programme.desc: Travel to Los Angeles, where the weather is warm and the local food is fantastic.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Memphis
programme.desc: From sweet deals on steak dinners at The Butchershop, to the guilty pleasure of indulgent surf and turf at Iris, Memphis is home to some of the best food you'll ever eat.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Worth the Wait
programme.desc: Alton Brown talks up his favorite beef Wellington, while Jamika Pessoa melts over buttery biscuits.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Feats Of Meat
programme.desc: Chefs share the most mouth-watering meat dishes they've ever eaten.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Wisconsin
programme.desc: Andrew visits America's Dairy Land, but he finds out there's a lot more going on with the food in Wisconsin than meets the eye. Andrew finds that Wisconsinites are finding new ways to do things the old fashioned way. He discovers the science behind milk.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: West Virginia
programme.desc: Andrew travels to West Virginia, where people are using methods both old and new to prepare wildlife that flourishes in the state's mountains and rivers.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Outer Banks
programme.desc: Andrew highlights the seafood lover's paradise of North Carolina's Outer Banks region. The unique location serves up dishes like blue crab, Hatteras clam chowder, baked oysters and other mouthwatering feasts born of the ocean.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Las Vegas
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern goes on a gastronomic tour of Las Vegas, NV. From quail breast stuffed with foie gras and mouth-watering Waygu steaks to classic veal Parmigiana and tantalizing Thai, Sin City has it all.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Aruba
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern takes a culinary tour of Aruba, where the climate is as warm as the people. He indulges in local favorites like hearty Dutch pea soup, comforting yet elegant seafood cazuela and sweet, buttery cashew cake.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Boston: A Second Bite
programme.desc: Boston is the heart of New England, the birthplace of American independence and home to so many delicious foods that it calls for more than one visit! Andrew Zimmern explores the flavours of Boston neighborhoods.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Minneapolis, MN
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to Minnesota's largest city, where he tries a legendary burger that's become a regional icon, noshes on a gigantic brunch meal served with its own food Ferris wheel and takes on a massive four-pound banh mi behemoth.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Worcester, MA
programme.desc: Casey Webb lands in Worcester, MA, where he slurps down some radical ramen, indulges in peanut butter cup French toast and takes on a rack of deep-fried ribs with the heat of a million Scoville units.

programme.title: Movie: Mickey's Great Clubhouse Hunt

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Nursery Schooling / Bunny Bunanza
programme.desc: After K.C. gets sick, Pip and Freddy watch the babies in the Nursery for her. Then, when delivery batches of bunnies get mixed up, the Junior Fliers must figure out which bunny is which.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Easter Wolfies / Luna and the Wolfies
programme.desc: The PJ Masks need to protect the chocolate eggs for an Easter hunt from the Wolfy Kids. Luna Girl works with the Wolfies to distract the PJ Masks while she steals the museum.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The House That Bulworth Built/ Moon Rescue Mission
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly build a brand new home for Bulworth; The pugs rescue Spot from the moon.

programme.title: Bluey: Bob Bilby / Spygame / Takeaway
programme.desc: Bingo brings home a Bob Bilby puppet; Bluey and Bingo play a spy game in the park; Bluey and her family have to wait for their takeaway order.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Meet the Evilmans
programme.desc: It's Romeo and Juliet super-style when a retired supervillain that happens to be Thunder Man's old nemesis moves to Hiddenville and his son and Phoebe secretly start dating.

programme.title: The Thundermans: The Girl with the Dragon Snafu
programme.desc: Phoebe joins the 'cool' group for a class project, only to find that they do not want to work as hard as she does. Max takes Phoebe's usual spot in her friends' group, and tries to coast by letting them do all the work.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Cheer and Present Danger
programme.desc: When only one of them makes the cheerleading squad, Phoebe and Cherry's friendship is tested. Max wins a month of free pizza and has to convince his family that he didn't cheat.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Who's Your Mommy?
programme.desc: Max and Phoebe accidentally sell one of Barb's old superhero utility belts at the family's garage sale and try to get it back before she finds out.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Mall Time Crooks
programme.desc: Phoebe and Max turn a simple trip to the mall to pick up Hank's birthday gift into fighting, chaos, and a run-in with security that threatens to derail their dad's birthday.

programme.title: The Thundermans: The Amazing Rat Race
programme.desc: Max helps Billy become the world's fastest rat so he can win the rat races he has with his bandmates.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Dino Fury: Winning Attitude
programme.desc: Izzy is determined to win a big race with the help of her Special Olympics athlete cousin, Lily. After Lily misses a training session and Izzy rejects more help, her sportsmanship is put to the test.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Dino Fury: Superstition Strikes
programme.desc: Amelia thinks she’s cursed with bad luck and is reluctant to help the Rangers, afraid she’ll cause more harm. But when monsters attack the base, she learns the truth about luck.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: V.I.Peeved/ Señor Class
programme.desc: When her blog is discovered by a famous musician, Carlota fears her family will embarrass her. Then, when Hector decides to finish his schooling, he become Ronnie Anne and Carl's new classmate.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Flea Market/ Copy Can't
programme.desc: Bobby struggles to give up control of the mercado; Ronnie Anne notices that she's the only person Carlitos won't copy.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Karma Chameleon/ Team Effort
programme.desc: The Changs go on vacation and leave Ronnie Anne and her cousins to watch after Cam, the chameleon snake.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Grandparent Trap/ Miss Step
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne thinks her grandparent's marriage is in trouble after watching a relationship talk show. Ronnie Anne learns the art of baile folklorico - and that her Tia Frida is one intense instructor.

programme.title: The Loud House: Picture Perfect/ Undie Pressure
programme.desc: Lincoln plots to take the "perfect" family photo for his parents' anniversary gift. Lincoln and his sisters bet on who can go the longest without doing their most annoying habits.

programme.desc: Lincoln and Clyde find out that ARGGH! is coming to town and decide to go to the taping. Tired of her siblings, Lori moves to the garage, but quickly finds it's more than she bargained for.

programme.title: The Loud House: Tripped!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Little Yellow Book/ Bumper to Bumper
programme.desc: Squidward finds SpongeBob's diary, and starts reading it out loud in the Krusty Krab.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Hello Bikini Bottom!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Karate Star

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Face Freeze/ Glove World R.I.P
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick bet who can hold a 'funny face' the longest until their faces freeze that way.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Jailbreak/ Evil Spatula
programme.desc: Plankton is in jail and plans to break out with the help of his fellow inmates. SpongeBob's spatula breaks so he replaces it with one of Plankton's.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Treats!/ For Here or to Go
programme.desc: Gary goes crazy over the new snail treats SpongeBob brought home.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Safe Deposit Krabs/ Plankton's Pet

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Super Evil Aquatic Villain Team Up Is Go/ Chum FRICASSee
programme.desc: Plankton teams up with Man Ray to take over the Krusty Krab and then-the world! Hahahahahaha!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Patrick! The Game/ The Sewers of Bikini Bottom

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Journey to the Center of Mikey's Mind

programme.desc: Amelia thinks she’s cursed with bad luck and is reluctant to help the Rangers, afraid she’ll cause more harm. But when monsters attack the base, she learns the truth about luck.

programme.desc: When Raph loses his fighting mojo, he must overcome his feelings to save his brothers from certain doom.

programme.title: Drama Club: Phoneless in Tookus

programme.desc: When the Wahoo Punch Bro is running amok through Swellview, Captain Man and Kid Danger must find a way to stop him. When Mitch Bilsky mocks Henry's kiddie motor scooter, Ray sets up a race between Henry and Mitch to prove whose transportation is faster.

programme.title: The Adventures of Kid Danger: Octo-Charlotte/ Trouble in Tropikini
programme.desc: Schwoz accidentally morphs Charlotte into half girl/ half octopus, Captain Man and Kid Danger work to change her back but first they must catch her. The group's vacation is cut short when Jasper falls into a volcano and is held captive by the Volcaniacs.

programme.desc: Henry gets a series of mysterious notes from someone and worries that this person may know his secret identity.

programme.title: Amphibia: Civil Wart/ Hop-Popular

programme.title: Parker Plays

programme.title: Amphibia: Family Fishing Trip/ Bizarre Bazaar

programme.title: Amphibia: Anne Theft Auto / Breakout Star
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Run Away Runway/ I Scream, You Scream
programme.desc: Candace becomes a runway supermodel and the boys decide to take on the fashion world creating a clothing line that personifies summer. Then, Isabella has her tonsils removed so the boys make her the world's biggest ice cream sundae.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Scary-oke

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Inconveniencing
programme.desc: When Dipper tries to impress Wendy by acting older than he really is, he's invited to join a group of teenagers on a trek that leads to an old abandoned convenience store that could be haunted.

programme.title: The Owl House: Covention
programme.desc: Luz learns about witch covens, but her lesson goes awry when she finds herself thrust into a witch's duel!

programme.title: Amphibia: Dating Season / Anne vs. Wild

programme.title: Wander Over Yonder: The Bounty / The Ball
programme.desc: Hater hires a bunch of bounty hunters to capture Wander but Peepers tries to thwart them so he can have all the glory to himself.

programme.title: Wander Over Yonder: The Date/The Buddies
programme.desc: When Lord Hater gets stood up on a date, Wander convinces Sylvia to endure a date with Hater in order save the planet from Hater’s wrath. Then, Lord Hater is forced to play the role of Wander’s friend when he is trapped on his own prison planet.

programme.title: Wander Over Yonder: The Greatest/ The Egg

programme.title: Wander Over Yonder: The Cool Guy/ The Catastrophe

programme.title: Wander Over Yonder: The Search for Captain Time/ The Heebie Jeebies
programme.desc: Lord Hater accidentally recruits a bloodthirsty alien hunter to help him find his missing pet. Wander and Sylvia search a creepy forest planet for a mystical power.

programme.desc: Spider-Man and Kid Arachnid travel to alternate dimensions in order to gather the shards from the broken Siege Perilous.

programme.desc: Caroline is excited to go out on her first date with Bobby, but she has nervous jitters when she realizes Max will be alone and in charge of the dessert bar. Also, Sophie and Oleg decide to mix things up and go out on a date instead of staying in.

programme.title: Funny You Should Ask
programme.desc: Guest stars include Jon Lovitz, Sherri Shepherd, Louie Anderson, Byron Allen, Caroline Rhea, and Billy Gardell.

programme.title: Black-ish: Under the Influence
programme.desc: Jack is going through an experimental phase and getting himself into trouble, so Dre chaperones the twins' school dance to keep an eye on him. Meanwhile, Junior fights with his girlfriend after she thinks he spends too much time taking care of Devante.

programme.title: Black-ish: Sugar Daddy
programme.desc: Dre is diagnosed with Type 2 Diabetes and after talking to Pops, he's resolved to curing himself. Meanwhile, Jack is convinced that baby Devante hates him, so he enlists Junior and Diane's help.

programme.title: Penn & Teller: April Fool Us Day: April Fool Us Day 2018
programme.desc: See those who've amused and fooled Penn and Teller, including a mind-reading chicken. Go behind the scenes to see special guests, never-before seen tricks and more surprises.

programme.title: Penn & Teller: April Fool Us Day: April Fool Us Day 2019
programme.desc: The world-famous team of Penn and Teller prank Chris Hardwick by turning him into an amazing, world-class magician as they send him to the streets of Vegas to bedazzle the crowds.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Wait Out
programme.desc: Jerry and Elaine are interested in dating a couple who recently ended their relationship.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Pilot
programme.desc: Jerry and George finally get the chance to have their pilot produced by the network; Elaine pickets a shop.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Skunk, Dog Crap and Ketchup
programme.desc: When Charlie and Lyndsey start becoming friendly, Alan's paranoia gets the best of him.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Nice to Meet You, Walden Schmidt
programme.desc: Ashton Kutcher joins the cast as Walden Schmidt, an Internet billionaire with a broken heart.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: Mama Drama
programme.desc: Adam's desire to be the lead in the school musical "Jesus Christ Superstar" goes unfulfilled when he's cast in something other than the leading role. Insistent that her son is a star, Beverly casts Adam in a rival show, but he becomes too self-obsessed.

programme.title: Mom: Fancy Crackers and Giant Women
programme.desc: Bonnie suffers withdrawal after giving up cable TV to help Christy pay for her law school applications. The women rally around Jill after she has a breakdown in her favourite department store.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Vanessa Fixes Kyle
programme.desc: Since Vanessa is feeling guilty after encouraging Mandy to break up with the sometimes clueless Kyle, she is determined to mend things, but her sincere efforts only seem to make a bad situation worse.

programme.desc: Your number one source for celebrity news, gossip and photos.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Thanksgiving
programme.desc: It's Thanksgiving Day in the Baxter house and Mike's father, Bud, takes everyone by surprise when he announces his plans to open a recreational marijuana store. Now, Mike struggles between supporting his dad and the message this could send to his family.

programme.title: Mom: Sticky Hands and a Walk on the Wild Side
programme.desc: Christy, Jill and Wendy find themselves in a sticky situation when they agree to help Bonnie smuggle an illegal substance across the Canadian border.

programme.title: America's Court With Judge Ross: Thugs R Us/ Rescue Dog Relief
programme.desc: Man sues owner of a convenience store; woman sues roommate for bringing home stray dog.

programme.title: The Verdict With Judge Hatchett: Gunned Out of a Lease and the Case of the Missing Van
programme.desc: Judge Hatchett presides over a dispute between a landlord and tenant over the presence of a gun. A man sues for towing fees after a friend fails to monitor his vehicle as promised.

programme.title: Protection Court: He Has An Open Warrant Your Honor/ We Have An Agreement
programme.desc: Judge Carroll Kelly advocates for the victims of crime by being tough, but fair.

programme.title: Ask Dr. LaViola
programme.desc: Dr. Jamie LaViola discusses how improvements to your smile can make a big difference. Don't let your fear of the dentist, or being too busy, keep you away from the smile you've always wanted.

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: Meditations on a List/ No Tickets to See Princess G
programme.desc: Man sues son for stealing client list; cousins argue over fake concert tickets.

programme.title: Lauren Lake's Paternity Court: Thompson vs. Pate-Thompson
programme.desc: A 32-year-old Michigan City, IN man brings his wife to court to DNA test her 4-month-old baby.

programme.title: Lauren Lake's Paternity Court: Mason vs. Malone
programme.desc: A 32-year-old man from Louisville, KY is convinced his girlfriend is sneaking around - and he has proof! He wants a DNA test for two children - an unborn baby and a one-year-old.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: Shirley had planned and paid for a baby shower, but was forced to cancel it due to COVID and wants her money back. The planner Courtney states there are no refunds.

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: The plaintiff has petitioned the court for a DNA test to see if the defendant is her biological brother.

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Segments include 'Losing it on His Sister.'

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Segments include 'Making a Getaway' and ' Terrible Tenant.'

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: Hair Nightmare/ Unlawful Tow
programme.desc: A woman sues her stylist over a bad hair weave; a man's car is towed from his residence.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: Patrick is suing Jamie for the return of his security deposit because she failed to pay his security deposit within 30 days. He claims he did a lot to fix up this moldy home and that this is a horrible display of professionalism.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I Was Given Up At Birth, Are You My Mother?
programme.desc: Monica began searching for the daughter she gave up, reaching out to hundreds of Desiraes on social media. However, what Monica didn’t know was that Desirae was also searching for her mother and a few months ago they found each other.

programme.title: Maury: Is the Woman I Love Cheating With My Dad? Test Them!
programme.desc: Desire and Theodora grew up like sisters in foster care, but Desire fears Theodora had an affair with her boyfriend Charles, who has been on the show for cheating before. Amy is worried her husband is cheating since she lost 140 pounds.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Jerry, It's Go Time
programme.desc: Guests are ready to move on and out. Weston is in love with Kirbey but feels she's to close to a male friend. Michael is ready to call it quits with his girlfriend over online friend Taylor. Lacey wants to reunite with Tavaris but he has plans with Tina.

programme.title: Maury: Will DNA Prove This Man Had a Child With My Wife?
programme.desc: Shinkell found out she had an STD when she got pregnant, so Rickey says she cheated and he's not the father. Nancy was with T.J. while on break from her husband; now T.J is denying her baby. Vernon's cousin doesn't think he's the father of Tokora's baby.

programme.desc: A pair of rare tickets to The Beatles film 'A Hard Day's Night' comes into the shop. Then, an 1850 Indian Peace Medal given by President Fillmore arrives. Later, Rick gets all hot and bothered when control over the thermostat becomes an all-out war.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Breaking the Bank
programme.desc: One of NBA legend Dr. J's supposed game-worn sneakers steps into the shop. Then, a rare half eagle coin from the Civil War shows up.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Hey, I Can Pee Outside in the Dark
programme.desc: Jake continuously plays 'Smoke on the Water' on his guitar and has developed a grumpy attitude. Alan tries a father/son chat, Charlie offers a jam session and Berta thinks Jake is just constipated.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: No Sniffing, No Wowing
programme.desc: Alan takes Charlie to meet with his divorce attorney, Laura, after Judith expresses concern that Charlie is a bad influence on Jake. Laura is open to Charlie's other relationships, but takes advantage of her request that he be available at any time.

programme.title: Friends: The One With Ross' Denial
programme.desc: Monica and Chandler cancel their plans to live together, due to their bickering over their tastes.

programme.title: Tee Time Augusta
programme.desc: Get a look at Masters week including historic moments, the growth of the game of golf and a preview of some of the world's best golfers. You'll also learn how the Augusta National is dealing with COVID-19 and minimal patrons allowed on the course.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Screamer
programme.desc: Tommy, a seemingly nice young man, accompanies Rachel to the opening of Joey's play.

programme.title: Friends: The One With Ross' Thing
programme.desc: Ross develops a mysterious skin abnormality that his doctor cannot identify. Phoebe can't decide whether to date a fireman or a teacher. Monica believes that Pete is going to propose.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Ultimate Fighting Championship
programme.desc: Pete's decision to compete in ultimate fighting forces Monica to make an important decision about their relationship. Phoebe sets Ross up on a date with a woman who used to be bald.

programme.title: Friends: The One at the Beach
programme.desc: Phoebe invites the gang to a Long Island beach house while she searches for her father. While there, Ross learns that Rachel still has feelings for him.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: An Old Flame With a New Wick
programme.desc: Charlie agrees to meet with a former girlfriend who broke his heart, but he is in for a surprise when he discovers that she is now a man named Bill. After managing to overcome his shock, Charlie's new friendship is jeopardized when Bill dates Evelyn.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: I Remember the Coatroom, I Just Don't Remember You
programme.desc: Judith's sister, Liz, hits on Alan at Jake's party despite having a history with Charlie. Meanwhile, Evelyn celebrates Jake's birthday in her own way.

programme.title: The World's Funniest Weather: Mud, Sweat and Tears
programme.desc: A leaky ceiling brings down the house, literally, a race car makes an unscheduled pit stop through a living room wall, and 'passing wind' takes on a whole new meaning during a weather report.

programme.title: The World's Funniest Weather: That Wind-Blown Look
programme.desc: A bug flies up a weatherman’s nose on live TV, a toddler’s urge to tinkle upstages his dad’s romantic marriage proposal, and a paraglider takes an unfortunate detour into a tree.

programme.title: American Ninja Warrior: Baltimore City Qualifiers
